 På Thalamus är gemenskap en viktig del, vilket gör att vi ordnar AW:s samt sommarfest och julbord. Då brukar alla konsulter dela erfarenheter och glädje med varandra och oss på kontoret.
 



 Har du frågor är du hjärtligt välkommen att ringa Dennis Palenzovski på 072 648 61 68 eller dennis.palenzovski@thalamus.se. Söker tjänsten gör du lämpligast via vår hemsida. Sista ansökningsdag är 25/06/26. Intervjuer kommer att ske fortlöpande och vi önskar tillsätta tjänsten omgående.
 



 Vi ser fram emot att få läsa din ansökan.
 



  





**Din nya arbetsgivare** 




 Thalamus har funnits i 20 år och är nu ett stadigt växande lönsamt konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom IT & Teknik.
 



 Vi är ett familjärt bolag som i Alvik strand och vår huvudsakliga fokus ligger på konsultverksamhet i Stockholms län.
 



 Våra kärnvärden är snabba och trevliga och att det kommer du att märka i rekryteringsprocessen och om du börjar arbeta hos oss. Om vi skulle beskriva oss själva skulle det vara att vi är ett glatt, kunskapsdrivet gäng vars arbete kännetecknas av kvalitet, nytänkande och personligt engagemang. Hoppas du vill bli en av oss?

title: IT-samordnare Enskede skola
description:
**Välkommen till oss**
 Enskede skola är idag en F-9-skola med ca 920 elever. Till hösten 2026 kommer skolans högstadium flyttas till en ny grundskola. Enskede skola står därmed inför en spännande utveckling då vi ombildas till en F-6-skola med ca 560 elever och byter namn till Gamla Enskede skola.
   

  

 På Enskede skola trivs man. Det syns både i elevernas svar kring trygghet och trivsel, i medarbetarundersökningar samt i en låg personalomsättning. Vi arbetar med en tillgänglig lärmiljö och har elevernas välmående i fokus för att på bästa sätt tillgodose alla elevers rätt till en god och likvärdig utbildning. IT är en viktig del av undervisning och lärande. Som stöd till den pedagogiska verksamheten finns en administrativ enhet bestående av vaktmästeri, kansli, IT-funktion, bibliotek och skolmåltid. Även stödfunktionerna ses som en viktig del av elevernas lärmiljö.
   

  

 Enskede skola ligger trevligt belägen i Gamla Enskede med goda kommunikationer, nära T-bana Sandsborg och Sockenplan samt bussar.
   

  

**Din roll**
 Som IT-samordnare är din uppgift är att ge stöd åt elever, pedagoger och annan personal inom IT-relaterade frågor. Du beställer och administrerar personalens och elevernas användarkonton, behörigheter, licenser och tjänstekort samt alla hårdvaror (datorer, ipads, projektorer, telefoner samt tillbehör). Du administrerar också olika verksamhetssystem samt hjälper till med installationer.
   

  

 Du är skolans kontaktperson mot utbildningsförvaltningens IT-enhet och du har löpande kontakt i frågor som rör drift, support och leveranser och förändringar inom IT-miljön.
   

  

 Som first-line support kommer mycket av din tid att handla om att kommunicera och att ge service. Du förväntas kunna ge användarstöd inom Microsoft Office 365, Teams, OneNote, Infomentor och andra system som används inom skolan.
   

  

 Du ingår i den administrativa enheten där du tillsammans med kollegorna har i uppdrag att säkerställa att det administrativa stödet till pedagoger och elever fungerar väl.
   

  

**Din kompetens och erfarenhet**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* lägst gymnasieutbildning
* god teknisk och IT-relaterad kompetens
* kunskaper i Microsoft 365 och Teams
* mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i både tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* relevant utbildning inom IT
* erfarenhet av IT-miljön inom utbildningsförvaltningen i Stockholm stad
* erfarenhet av hårdvaruhantering och logistik kring tekniska utrullningar


 Som person behöver du vara strukturerad, administrativt skicklig och kunna ha många bollar i luften samtidigt. Du är lösningsorienterad och gillar att ge service. Du kan kommunicera på ett tydligt sätt och ha ett trevligt och professionellt bemötande även under pressade stunder. Det är också viktigt att du kan arbeta både självständigt och i team. Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Intervjuer kommer ske löpande under hela anställningsperioden så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Information Architect
description:
**I** 
**nformationsarkitekter till B3** 
**Visab Consulting**
 Hos B3 Visab Consulting stödjer vi finansindustrins utveckling i den digitala ekonomin. Vi söker nu fler engagerade informationsarkitekter som vill vara med och bidra till en samhällskritisk bransch. Med över 40 års erfarenhet har vi byggt långsiktiga relationer med ledande aktörer inom bank och försäkring, och vår expertis gör oss även till en attraktiv partner för snabbväxande företag.
   

  

**Om rollen** 
 Som informationsarkitekt hos oss får du arbeta i varierande uppdrag där du hjälper kunder att utveckla och implementera robust informationsarkitektur. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Skapa riktlinjer och standarder för informationsarkitekturens struktur.
* Sätta upp processer för att hantera och vidareutveckla informationsflöden.
* Säkerställa att rätt information når rätt personer vid rätt tidpunkt.
* Arbeta med datalagring, tillgänglighet och säkerhet för att förhindra obehörig åtkomst och dataförluster.


 Vi tror att framgång bygger på samarbete och kunskapsdelning och vi ser gärna att du är en lagspelare som uppskattar att arbeta prestigelöst och flexibelt.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som informationsarkitekt eller enterprisearkitekt, med fokus på informationsstruktur.
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet från bank- eller försäkringssektorn.
* Tidigare erfarenhet som konsult.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* Certifieringar inom relevanta områden är meriterande, liksom erfarenhet som verksamhetsarkitekt.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.


**Varför B3** 
 Visab? Vi är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande företag inom IT och management. Hos oss får du det bästa av två världar: kraften från ett stort bolag och den personliga samhörigheten från ett mindre. Vi är stolta över att ha blivit erkända som "Årets Karriärföretag" och av "Great Place to Work". Våra medarbetare pratar om friheten att påverka sina uppdrag, arbetsmiljön där olikheter välkomnas, och stoltheten över att bidra till både kunders framgång och samhället i stort. Vi samarbetar med initiativ som Women in Tech, Changers Hub och Pink Programming för att göra skillnad.
   

  

**Kontakt** 
 :
   

  

 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Lidia Hagos (lidia.hagos@b3.se) eller konsultchef Hanna Skoog (+4670-260 12 65).

title: Content Lead
description:
Auctionet is a marketplace where auction houses from Sweden, Great Britain, Finland, Spain, Germany, and Denmark sell furniture, art, design objects, collectibles, and much more. We are now looking for a Content lead who wants to be part of our team and contribute to our growth and brand positioning across existing and new markets
 **.**
**About The Role**
 This is a high-ownership, high-impact role. You'll be the person who defines what Auctionet sounds like – across every channel, every touchpoint, and every stage of the customer journey. We have a product people genuinely love, with strong word-of-mouth and loyal users and we need you to help us take our brand voice and story to another level. This is a strategic yet hands on role, so you'll need to be comfortable doing as well as directing.
   

  

 You'll report to the CMO and work closely with performance, lifecycle, specialists, and commercial.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Content strategy & brand voice – Define and own our messaging framework and content pillars across all markets and channels to help position our brand as well as ensure consistency in our tone-of-voice
* SEO & AEO – Drive our organic visibility strategy from keyword research and on-page content to positioning for AI-driven search
* Email & CRM – Optimise content for customer lifecycle flows– welcome, activation, retargeting, win-back together with the lifecycle team
* Paid content – Develop campaign concepts and messaging layers for paid campaigns in collaboration with brand design and head of digital marketing
* Organic social – Own the overall content and campaign calendar and adapt our story for each platform


 This role is based in Stockholm, with the possibility to work remotely one day per week.
   

  

**About The Team**
 You'll be the 13th team member of the marketing team, consisting of a team of specialists across performance, social media, item specialists, brand design and lifecycle marketing.
   

  

 Auctionet has around 170 employees and is the parent company of a wider group with approximately 400 colleagues across multiple countries. Our main office is near Stureplan in central Stockholm, with logistics centers in Malmö, Stockholm, Gothenburg, Westbury, and Cologne.
   

  

**About You**
 You understand that great content doesn't just inform — it moves people. You know how to write in a way that awakens emotions and makes them act, and you know why it converts.
   

  

 You're someone who thinks in systems as much as stories. You can zoom out to set a content strategy and zoom in to fix a headline. You're comfortable being the one who sets the direction — but you don't wait for someone else to execute it.
   

  

 You care deeply about brand, but you know when to adapt and when to hold the line. You're equally at home in a performance brief as in a brand workshop, and you know how to connect the two.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we think you have:**
* Profound experience in content marketing, ideally at a B2C company with a transactional or marketplace model
* Experience in brand positioning and understand how to navigate that through communications, messaging and campaign concepts in an international environment across several channels and markets
* Proven SEO and AEO experience: you've driven organic growth, not just written articles
* An analytical and curious mindset where you are used to GA4, Search Console, and email metrics
* Comfortable owning end-to-end content production in a lean team
* Near-native or native written English


**Bonus and not mandatory:**
* You've been part of a brand journey that actually landed — new market, new audience, or new positioning — and you owned a real piece of it
* Experience with marketplaces, e-commerce, or auction platforms
* Having built a content function from scratch
* UK English is a plus


****Our Recruitment Process****
 We have a straightforward process without unpleasant surprises.
   

  

 We'll start of with a short phone interview and greet just to get a feeling if we could be right for each other or not.
   

  

 We then have a few meetings (usually two or three) where we talk about you, the role and Auctionet - and you get the chance to talk to the people you will work closely with.
 **In the process, we will also ask you to do a small take-home exercise.** 
 And in the end, we hope it feels like the perfect fit for both of us!
   

  

****Apply By****
 We will be reviewing applications continuously, but please submit your application no later than
 **18th of June** 
 .
   

  

****Who We Are****
 Auctionet was founded in 2011 by a team of people with unique experience of online auctions. Read more about Auctionet here.
   

  

 In 2021 Auctionet acquired the auction house Stockholms Auktionsverk, and we are now by far the largest auction marketplace in the Nordics, and one of the larger auction marketplaces in the world. With this acquisition, Auctionet owns and operates both the oldest auction house in the world (1674) and the second oldest (1681), which means we have been working with sustainability for 350(!) years.
   

  

 Join us in our vision to make valued objects accessible for everyone, from everywhere!

title: Solutions Consultant
description:
**Our Mission**
 At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!
   

  

 This role is remote, but distance is no barrier to impact. Our hybrid teams collaborate across geographies to solve big problems, stay close to our customers, and grow together. You will be part of a culture that values trust, accountability, and shared success where your work truly matters.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The Team Our Solutions Consultant team members work hand-in-hand with large organizations around the world to keep their digital environments protected. We educate, inspire, and empower our potential clients in their journey to transform their security architectures. You are empowered with unmatched systems and tools and a team built on joint success. You won’t find someone at Palo Alto Networks that isn’t committed to your success – with everyone pitching in to assist when it comes to solutions selling, learning, and development. Our Solutions Consulting community is driven by the mission to be our customers’ cybersecurity partner of choice, protecting their digital way of life. Job Summary The Solutions Consultant is the evolution of the traditional Sales Engineering role, aligning how we best serve our customers in understanding their environment, providing solution guidance and ensuring value realization in their investment with Palo Alto Networks. As a Solutions Consultant you provide technical leadership and expertise and guidance in your customer’s security transformation journey. You will play a key role in defining technical solutions that secure a customer’s key business imperatives and ensuring value realization of their investment with Palo Alto Networks. You evangelize our industry leadership in on-prem, cloud, and security operations services that establish PANW as your customer’s cybersecurity partner of choice. Key Responsibilities Curiosity is core to the Solutions Consultant role, and you see complex problems as opportunities to learn and deliver innovative solutions! You define your impact by: Meeting and exceeding sales quotas by building and implementing strategic, technical account plans that target cross-platform solutions Understands Key customer business requirements and has the ability to position, demonstrate and create high level designs across the entire PANW portfolio solutions creating business value for customers Ability to drive customer adoption of Palo Alto Networks Platform. Building customer relationships by helping customers achieve increased productivity, operational efficiency, security efficacy, and greater flexibility to innovate Conducting discovery to understand and articulate the key technical, operational, and commercial imperatives of your prospects and customers Working closely with Professional Services, Customer Success and Specialist teams to ensure overall customer implementation and adoption of solutions Demonstrating strong communication skills, influencing through effective presentations and customer-specific demos, and conducts technical engagements and workshops that are clear and impactful, simplifying complex ideas for various audiences Leading successful technical validation efforts based on best practices to ensure technical win in assigned opportunities Demonstrates Cross functional leadership driving collaboration and orchestrating supporting resources (Specialists, Channel Resources, Customer Support) to ensure a one-team approach that demonstrates a cohesive strategy Promoting end-to-end solutions that include PANW and/or partner professional services to ensure customers realize business value sooner Understanding the competitive landscape and effectively differentiating PANW's leadership in the cybersecurity space Continuously investing in yourself to develop technical and professional skills that drive your ever-increasing contributions to success of our customers while actively participating within the Solutions Consultant community and at industry events Identifying technical stakeholders and cultivating relationships with key personas to build and drive a security architecture transformation roadmap
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required Qualifications 6+ years experience in pre-sales/sales engineering Skilled in at least one of the following Networking, Network Security, Cybersecurity, Private/Public Cloud Security, SOC/Endpoint or SASE Experience in delivering cybersecurity solutions that solve technical challenges and influence new business initiatives is preferred Influencing and gaining buy-in from key stakeholders, either in a customer-facing or internal role; prior experience in a pre-sales role is ideal Creating and delivering technical presentations, workshops, or technical validation engagements Experience in selling, designing, implementing, or managing one or more of the following solutions: Network Security, SASE, SaaS, CNAPP and/or SOC Transformation Technologies Partnering with Customer Support functions to ensure successful implementation and adoption of sold solutions Experience in complex sales involving long sales processes with multiple buying centers and multi-product solutions are preferred This is a field sales position where travel requirements may be required to support in person customer meetings, please discuss with the recruiter on the specifics for this position. Proficient in English and Swedish
   

  

**Our Commitment**
 We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.
   

  

 We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.
   

  

 Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.
   

  

 Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

title: Senior Director, Demand Generation - Europe North
description:
IFS is a billion-dollar revenue company with 7000+ employees on all continents. Our leading AI technology is the backbone of our award-winning enterprise software solutions, enabling our customers to be their best when it really matters–at the Moment of Service™. Our commitment to internal AI adoption has allowed us to stay at the forefront of technological advancements, ensuring our colleagues can unlock their creativity and productivity, and our solutions are always cutting-edge.
   

  





 At IFS, we’re flexible, we’re innovative, and we’re focused not only on how we can engage with our customers but on how we can make a real change and have a worldwide impact. We help solve some of society’s greatest challenges, fostering a better future through our agility, collaboration, and trust.
   

  





 We celebrate diversity and understand our responsibility to reflect the diverse world we work in. We are committed to promoting an inclusive workforce that fully represents the many different cultures, backgrounds, and viewpoints of our customers, our partners, and our communities. As a truly international company serving people from around the globe, we realize that our success is tantamount to the respect we have for those different points of view.
   

  





 By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to be part of a
 **global, diverse environment;** 
 you will be joining a
 **winning team** 
 with a
 **commitment to sustainability;**
 and a company where we get things done so that you can
 **make a positive impact** 
 on the world.
   

  





 We’re looking for innovative and original thinkers to work in an environment where you can
 **#MakeYourMoment** 
 so that we can help others make theirs. With the power of our AI-driven solutions, we empower our team to change the status quo and make a real difference.
   

  





 If you want to change the status quo, we’ll help you make your moment. Join Team Purple. Join IFS.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 The Senior Director of Demand Gen for North Europe is the regional marketing leader responsible for driving revenue-contributing pipeline across the Nordic countries. This individual is the primary marketing business partner to the North Europe MDs, CDs and Heads of Sales and aligns the full marketing mix to CRO priorities.
   

  




* Own regional demand generation strategy and pipeline contribution targets aligned to regional revenue goals
* Lead a team of marketers + BDR Director & BD team covering Net New, Install Base, Channel, and ABM motions
* Co-define quarterly territory plans with sales leadership; present marketing ROI in CRO QBRs
* Oversee IFS Connect events, partner marketing programmes, and ABM/AI campaign execution
* Manage regional marketing budget with full accountability


**Qualifications**
* 10+ years of experience in B2B demand generation or field marketing, ideally within enterprise software or SaaS
* Proven track record of delivering significant pipeline growth across multiple European markets
* Strong experience in both net new acquisition and install base marketing
* Deep understanding of complex sales cycles and enterprise buying groups



**Regional Expertise**



* Experience operating across Northern Europe
* Ability to navigate regional differences in marketing execution, channels, and buyer behaviour



**Industry Experience in one or more of the following sectors:**



* Manufacturing
* Energy, Utilities & Resources
* Transportation
* Construction & Engineering
* Telecommunication



**Skills & Competencies**



* Strategic thinker with strong execution discipline
* Highly data-driven with strong analytical skills
* Expertise in ABM, digital demand generation, and integrated campaign planning
* Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment



**Key Success Metrics**



* Pipeline generation (net new and install base)
* Marketing-sourced and influenced revenue
* Campaign ROI and efficiency
* Sales alignment and satisfaction

title: Head of Savings Technology within Group Product Technologies at Swedbank
description:
Are you passionate about leadership and want to establish a first-class organization within Swedbank’s IT organization for Savings Technology?
   

  

 As Head of Savings Technology, you will lead a technology organization and its management team, with responsibility for Swedbank’s platforms supporting savings and investment products – including funds, equities, and other asset classes across various account and wrapper solutions.
   

  

 The organization is in the midst of a multi-year transformation, impacting technology, operating model, and ways of working. You will lead this transformation – driving modernization, building high-performing teams, and evolving processes to meet future demands.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to have a substantial impact on Swedbank’s future in savings – a core part of our identity rooted in our savings bank heritage.
   

  

 In Swedbank you have the opportunity to
 **:**
* Lead and develop a high-performing, inclusive organization, fostering trust, engagement, and strong leadership
* Align priorities and delivery with Swedbank’s strategy, with a focus on the Savings business
* Drive performance, continuous improvement, and measurable outcomes across the organization
* Develop leaders and teams, promoting a culture of learning, accountability, and growth
* Create a sustainable and engaging work environment that supports well-being and long-term performance
* Lead cross-functional collaboration and manage senior stakeholders to ensure alignment and trust
* Co-define priorities with business partners and ensure end-to-end delivery across the Savings technology portfolio
* Define and drive the technology roadmap, including transformation, investments, and future capabilities
* Ensure delivery, stability, and evolution of secure, scalable, and resilient platforms
* Continuously modernize and optimize the technology landscape to improve efficiency and time to market
* Build a scalable, future-ready organization aligned with both current and long-term needs


 What is needed in this role:
   

  

* Senior technology leader, experienced in leading leaders and building high-performing, inclusive teams
* Experience from leading technology in financial services or highly regulated environments
* Strong track record of driving transformation from strategy to measurable results
* Ability to define strategy and translate it into clear roadmaps and priorities with business and tech stakeholders
* Solid foundation in IT development and service delivery, ensuring delivery and operational stability
* Skilled at collaborating cross-functionally and influencing senior stakeholders
* Good understanding of the savings & investment area
* Proven ability to modernize legacy platforms and drive cloud/data transformation
* A structured yet adaptable approach, with the ability to challenge, make decisions, and lead with courage and integrity
* Excellent communicator, fluent in Swedish and English


 With us, you can experience:
   

  

* Personal and professional growth through self-leadership and continuous development.
* Meaningful work that positively impacts our workplace, our customers, and society.
* An open and collaborative culture that encourages cross-functional teamwork and provides networking opportunities.
* A supportive and inclusive environment that promotes a balanced and sustainable work-life, with flexible working conditions when suitable for the role.
* Benefits such as our share based reward program Eken, company pension plan, employee offer for banking products, health insurance.


 This is our team:
   

  

 Our mission is to continuously improve savings and investment services for customers, colleagues, and partners—guided by Swedbank’s values: Open, Simple & Caring.
   

  

 Trust, transparency, and psychological safety are key to transformation. By empowering each other through honesty, support, and new ways of thinking, we both adapt to and drive change.
   

  

 You can expect a committed, straightforward leadership team focused on making a real difference together. -
 **Martin Arvidson, your future manager**
 We look forward to receiving your application by 25.06.2026. We work with continuous selection, which means that the position may be filled before the application deadline.
   

  

**Location: Sundbyberg, Stockholm**
**Recruiting manager: Martin Arvidson**
 We would like to let you know that a background check and a drug test may be a part of the process for this role.
   

  

*We have made our choice regarding recruitment media and therefore kindly decline contact with ad sellers or sellers of other recruitment services.*
**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**

title: Security Systems Engineer
description:
**Description**
 Välkommen till SSC Space (tidigare Swedish Space Corporation), den perfekta arbetsplatsen för dig som brinner för teknik i allmänhet och rymden i synnerhet.
   

  

 Vi äger och driver Esrange Space Center, en av världens mest mångsidiga anläggningar för raket- och stratosfärisk ballongverksamhet, där vi möjliggör ett brett spektrum av vetenskapliga och tekniska uppdrag.
   

  

 Med rymdorganisationer, forskningsinstitut samt institutionella och kommersiella aktörer som kunder erbjuder vi bland annat specialistkompetens inom satellitkommunikation, konsulttjänster för rymdfarkoster, raket- och stratosfäriska ballongsystem. SSC Space driver ett av världens största globala nätverk av markstationer för satellitkommunikation.
   

  

 Vill du arbeta med nätverk i en av Europas mest avancerade och spännande tekniska miljöer?
   

  

 Esrange Space Center, Europas nordligaste rymdbas, söker nu en Nätverksingenjör som vill vara med och säkra och vidareutveckla den kritiska nätverksinfrastrukturen bakom raket‑, ballong‑ och satellitverksamhet i världsklass.
   

  

**Requirements**
 Vi befinner oss i en spännande fas där vi stärker och moderniserar vår fysiska säkerhet i en internationell kontext. Nu söker vi en Security Systems Engineer som vill ta ett helhetsgrepp kring våra tekniska säkerhetslösningar och vara med och forma både riktning och struktur framåt.
   

  

 Vi tror att du trivs i en roll där du får ta ansvar, göra egna vägval och samarbeta med många olika funktioner – från tekniker och IT-specialister till externa leverantörer. Här är det lika viktigt att kunna se helheten som att förstå detaljerna.
   

  

 Skallkrav
   

  

* Teknisk högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Minst fem års arbetslivserfarenhet i en teknisk roll inom nätverk, säkerhet eller säkerhetssystem eller annat relevant område för tjänsten.
* Erfarenhet av tekniska säkerhetssystem (t.ex. passersystem, larm, kamera eller liknande)
* God förståelse för IT-infrastruktur och nätverk (IP-baserade miljöer)
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat med tekniska lösningar och dokumentation
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


 Meriterande
   

  

* Erfarenhet av ARX eller liknande system
* Erfarenhet av integrationer mellan olika system
* Bakgrund inom nätverk/infrastruktur (VLAN, segmentering, brandväggar)
* Erfarenhet från större eller internationella miljöer
* Arbete i säkerhetsklassade eller reglerade verksamheter
* Kunskap om identitet/access eller OT/IoT


**Responsibilities**
 I den här rollen blir du en nyckelperson i gränslandet mellan säkerhet, IT och verksamhet. Du kommer inte bara arbeta med teknik i detalj, utan också bidra till hur våra system ska designas, integreras och utvecklas över tid. Det handlar om att skapa lösningar som är robusta och säkra – men också praktiska, skalbara och hållbara i vardagen.
   

  

 Du kommer att ha ett initialt fokus på våra svenska verksamheter, där du bygger en stabil teknisk grund. Därefter är målet att lösningarna ska kunna användas i en bredare internationell miljö. Det innebär att du får arbeta både operativt och strategiskt, och ha en reell påverkan på hur våra säkerhetssystem fungerar globalt.
   

  

 Hos SSC Space blir du en del av en organisation med lång erfarenhet och global närvaro, men som samtidigt är i ständig utveckling. Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats där teknikintresse, samarbete och nyfikenhet står i centrum – och där du får möjlighet att påverka på riktigt.
   

  

 Utöver en spännande roll får du också tillgång till attraktiva förmåner, en flexibel och öppen arbetsmiljö samt goda möjligheter att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
   

  

**Benefits**
 VI ERBJUDER DIG
   

  

* En unik möjlighet att arbeta i rymdindustrin
* En tekniskt avancerad och internationell arbetsmiljö
* Stora möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och certifiering
* Engagerade kollegor och nära samarbete mellan teknik, drift och verksamhet
* Arbete på plats på Esrange Space Center utanför Kiruna, i en miljö som få andra kan erbjuda


 Övriga förmåner
   

  

* Utöver semester och traditionella helgdagar erbjuder vi extra lediga dagar, såsom arbetstidsförkortning mellan jul och nyår samt Kristi Himmelsfärdshelgen — totalt 6–11 extra dagar beroende på kalenderåret.
* Friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr per år.
* Hälsorelaterade förmåner såsom frivillig sjukvårdsförsäkring och regelbundna hälsokontroller för berättigade medarbetare.
* Möjlighet till förmånscykel genom leasingupplägg.
* Stöd för medarbetarinitierade aktiviteter som främjar hälsa, gemenskap och kultur.
* Kollektivavtal inklusive bra pensionslösningar, föräldralön och försäkringar.


 PLACERING
   

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid (40h/vecka). Din huvudsakliga arbetsplats är Esrange Space Center, med möjlighet till arbete i Kiruna centrum vid behov.
   

  

**Nästa Steg**
 Om denna möjlighet väcker ditt intresse så är du varmt välkommen med din ansökan! I den här rekryteringen samarbetar vi med One Partner Group, därav tar vi endast emot ansökningar via deras webbsida, följ denna länk.
   

  

 Intervjuer sker löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

**Kontaktpersoner**
 Peter Nilsson Sandlund, 070-549 94 82, peter.nilsson.sandlund@onepartnergroup.se eller Johanna Forsell, 072-215 63 08, johanna.forsell@onepartnergroup
   

  

 Detta är en säkerhetsklassad position, detta innebär att svenskt medborgarskap krävs, samt att anställning förutsätter godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt gällande regelverk.
   

  

 Vid Frågor Som Rör Anställningsvillkor Eller Fackliga Frågor Är Du Välkommen Att Kontakta Våra Fackliga Representanter
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: af@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

 Vi hjälper jorden dra nytta av rymden
   

  

 SSC Space är en ledande global leverantör av avancerade rymdtjänster med mer än 50 års erfarenhet. Vi hjälper rymdorganisationer, forskningsinstitut, kommersiella och institutionella aktörer från hela världen att få tillgång till rymden.  Med lokal närvaro på alla kontinenter och cirka 800 engagerade medarbetare erbjuder vi specialistkompetens inom satellitkommunikation och satellitkontrolltjänster, rymdfarkost operationer, raket- och ballongsystem, uppskjutningstjänster och flygtest tjänster, samt ingenjörs-, drift- och konsulttjänster för rymduppdrag.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from space. Läs mer på sscspace.com

title: Account Manager
description:
foodora is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience-fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
   

  

**Job Description**
**From groceries and flowers to dog food and phone chargers - these days, you can order just about anything through the foodora app. This level of convenience is made possible by the expertise of our Marketplace team. We're currently on the lookout for our next superstar Account Manager to join this dynamic group. In this role, you'll be the key ingredient in nurturing and strengthening relationships with our existing partners, ensuring that every collaboration becomes a mutual success story! If you want to be a part of reshaping the way people do their shopping, now is your time!**
**Your mission**
 Join our team and create an impact in the quick commerce revolution! We partner with retailers across various industries with a strong focus on grocery partnerships.
   

  

* Manage a dynamic portfolio ranging from influential local businesses to the largest brands within the grocery and retail sector.
* Educate our partners within quick commerce and analyze their performance on our platform to set a joint plan for future success, with a strong focus on developing their digital business.
* Develop a successful collaboration with partners and create a commercial plan with primary focus on order and revenue growth.
* Drive partner engagement and visibility by planning and activating promotions across your portfolio.


 We are looking for a true foodorian who enjoys working in a
 **dynamic** 
 environment and is eager to elevate our team. To thrive in this role, you'll need to bring loads of
 **energy** 
 and
 **drive** 
 - we are not just closing deals, we are creating new consumer behaviors and we need you to take it to the next level!
 **Cooperation** 
 is our secret sauce, and we believe that effective teamwork turns prospects into partners. Your
 **solution-oriented** 
 mindset allows you to see a new approach instead of the bumps in the road. If you’re
 **responsible** 
 and capable of juggling multiple tasks without dropping the ball, you’ll fit right in. Since you’ll be collaborating with various partners, building and maintaining
 **strong relationships** 
 will be your bread and butter, driving our collective success
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum 2 years of working within B2B Sales or Customer Success with good results
* Fluent in Swedish and English
* You have a driver's license
* Any experience from working with or within FMCG is a big plus.


**Additional Information**
* Wellness allowance topped with the opportunity to participate in many work/life balance initiatives at foodora such as wellness hour & reduced price on massage.
* Employee discount at foodora (woho!) and awesome friday breakfasts!
* Occupational pension, incl. premium exemption insurance, accident insurance and life insurance.
* foodora Learning - Monthly learning sessions about different topics, such as the q-commerce industry, negotiation techniques and project management combined with a structured onboarding and inspiring courses within our learning tool Sana
* Great deals at Benify (for e.g. gym membership, e-bikes hotels, audiobooks, streaming services, clothes, kitchen supplies… and so much more!
* Awesome AW’s and (pink) parties!

title: IT Projektledare
description:
*Vill du leda verksamhetskritiska IT-projekt som gör verklig skillnad för kunder och verksamheter? Har du erfarenhet av att driva komplexa IT-leveranser och trivs i rollen som länken mellan kund, verksamhet och teknik? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig.*
*Vi söker nu en erfaren IT Projektledare som vill vara med och driva våra kunders digitala utveckling framåt. Rollen innebär ett helhetsansvar för projektleveranser – från behovsanalys och planering till genomförande, överlämning och uppföljning.*
**Om rollen**
 Som IT Projektledare ansvarar du för att leda och koordinera IT-projekt med fokus på kvalitet, kundvärde och framgångsrik leverans. Du arbetar nära kunder, tekniska specialister, leveransorganisation och externa leverantörer för att säkerställa att projekten genomförs enligt överenskommen tidplan, budget och scope.
   

  

**Du Kommer Att**
* Leda IT-projekt från initiering till avslut
* Ansvara för projektplanering, resursallokering och uppföljning
* Delta i kunddialoger, behovsanalyser och framtagning av lösningsförslag
* Säkerställa att projekt levereras enligt uppsatta mål, budget och tidsramar
* Identifiera och hantera risker, förändringar och beroenden
* Koordinera interna team, kunder och externa leverantörer
* Säkerställa dokumentation, rapportering och kunskapsöverföring
* Ansvara för överlämning till förvaltning och support efter projektets avslut


 Projekten omfattar områden som IT-drift, infrastruktur, molntjänster, migreringar och modernisering av kunders IT-miljöer.
   

  

**Krav**
* Högskoleutbildning inom IT, teknik eller motsvarande
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som IT-projektledare eller IT-uppdragsledare inom områden som IT-drift, infrastruktur, molntjänster, migreringar och modernisering av kunders IT-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av att självständigt driva komplexa IT-projekt från start till mål
* Erfarenhet av IT-drift, infrastruktur, molntjänster eller IT-leveranser
* God teknisk förståelse och förmåga att kommunicera med både kunder och tekniska specialister
* Erfarenhet av projektplanering, resursstyrning och budgetuppföljning
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska


**Meriterande**
* Certifiering inom projektledning (PMP, PRINCE2, IPMA eller liknande)
* Teknisk bakgrund inom IT-drift eller infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av molnmigreringar, hybrid- eller multicloudlösningar
* Erfarenhet av ITIL och förvaltningsöverlämningar
* Erfarenhet av pre-sale, offertarbete eller anbudsprocesser
* Erfarenhet av strategiska IT-projekt och arbete mot styrgrupper


**Vem är du?**
 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du är en trygg projektledare med god affärsförståelse och ett genuint intresse för teknik. Du är strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och van att skapa framdrift även i komplexa projektmiljöer med många intressenter.
   

  

 Du har förmågan att bygga förtroendefulla relationer, kommunicera tydligt och skapa samsyn mellan verksamhet, kund och teknik. Samtidigt trivs du med att ta ansvar, fatta beslut och säkerställa att projekt når sina mål.
   

  

**Det här erbjuder vi**
**Flexibilitet:** 
 Jobba två dagar i veckan var du vill, hemma, på kontoret eller någon annanstans.
   

  

**Kollegorna:** 
 Här jobbar du med människor som kan sin sak och delar gärna med sig.
   

  

**Rätt storlek:** 
 Stora nog för att ge utveckling, små nog för att du ska göra skillnad.
   

  

**Teknikpeng:** 
 Du väljer utrustningen, vi står för notan.
   

  

**Utveckling:** 
 Vi gillar när du växer, testar nytt och utmanar oss.
   

  

**Bakgrundskontroll**
 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomför vi bakgrundskontroller på de kandidater som är aktuella för en anställning. Kontrollen görs först efter ditt samtycke.
   

  

 Vi är IT-partnern med den perfekta storleken för dig! Vi bygger en långsiktig relation där vi bidrar med proaktivitet och affärsnytta för din verksamhet. Med vår leverans av IT-avdelning som tjänst gör vi alltid vårt yttersta för att leverera med hög kvalitet med ett personligt engagemang. Vi skapar förutsättningar för en bättre arbetsdag!
   

  

*Observera att återkoppling kan dröja något längre än vanligt på grund av semestertider. Vi uppmuntrar dig ändå att skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!*
 Vi är IT-partnern med den perfekta storleken för dig! Vi bygger en långsiktig relation där vi bidrar med proaktivitet och affärsnytta för din verksamhet. Med vår leverans av IT-avdelning som tjänst gör vi alltid vårt yttersta för att leverera med hög kvalitet med ett personligt engagemang. Vi skapar förutsättningar för en bättre arbetsdag!

title: Cable Harness Engineer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your role**
 As a Cable Harness Design Engineer, you will be at the forefront of technical leadership, driving innovative solutions and ensuring successful project delivery. As a Designer you will work with design team (local and global team), work closely with Project Managers on the Delivery teams, and collaborate within a multidisciplinary group of engineers to achieve outstanding results.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Responsible for the design and development of electrical wiring harnesses, including creation and modification of bundle drawings and 2D schematics.
* Execute the technical plan by assessing design partners, supporting client counterparts, and ensuring timely, high quality technical delivery.
* Electrical design cable harness for low voltage and high voltage.
* Apply GD&T principles, automotive technical standards, and advanced design methodologies - leveraging tools such as CATIA; Sabre, Jira to deliver high quality, manufacturable components that optimise vehicle performance and production efficiency.
* Partner closely with Project Managers to maintain alignment across delivery teams and influence successful project outcomes.
* Skilled in scheduling technical deliverables while applying DfM practices, assembly and production drawings, and cross functional collaboration to drive on time, high quality results.


**Your Profile**
* University degree in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering or related discipline.
* 2–7 years of experience in product development as a Design Engineer.
* Strong proficiency in SABER, Catia V5, PDM system (Enovia) and deviation handling tools.
* Proven ability to implement standards on engineering drawings and interpret production drawings.
* Experience in design for manufacturing (DFM) and working with cross-functional teams.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We support your personal development and offer an education library with more than 250 000 (!) courses and educations and certifications.


*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Senior Customer Success Manager
description:
***Ready to join the clear market leader and help pioneer the future of Invoice Lifecycle Management?***
*If you're excited by growth, inspired by innovation, and want to be part of a company with a strong integrity and a supportive, value-driven culture, this is your opportunity to join the team that’s taking Invoice Lifecycle Management to new heights—and reshaping the future of finance.*
*At Basware, we didn’t just create the electronic invoice—we revolutionized how the world’s largest organizations manage, automate, and control their Accounts Payable operations. Basware has already processed over $10 trillion invoices—ensuring tax compliance, eliminating errors, and preventing fraud in jurisdictions across the globe.*
*Recognized as the #1 solution in our category by top analyst firms like Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, Basware is trusted by more than 6,000 customers worldwide—including many of the most iconic global brands. We’re proud to support their finance teams with mission-critical SaaS software that delivers clear and compelling value to CFOs and their organizations.*
 As a
 **Senior Customer Success Manager** 
 , you will be part of the Basware Customer Success organization focused on our strategic accounts. The role of Customer Success is to provide services that help Basware customers adopt, optimize, and accelerate the benefits of their Basware solutions and services.
   

  

 This hybrid position is to join our Nordic team, based out of our Stockholm office, and will involve working with named strategic customers across multiple sectors—typically on a global scale—to ensure they realize maximum business value from their investment in Basware. Fully remote working can also be considered within other areas in Sweden.
   

  

 The person we are looking for will need to have a strong focus and passion for driving adoption, customer retention, customer satisfaction and be comfortable playing a leading role when coordinating across Basware to deliver on success and improvement plans. You will also be comfortable speaking with all customer contacts at all levels, from AP teams to the C suite.
   

  

**Key job tasks & responsibilities:**
**Develop and implement strategies for customer success**
* Create, maintain, and implement achievable customer success plans at any stage of the customer lifecycle. Continuously monitor, measure, guide and align both customer stakeholders and others within Basware to ensure tangible business outcomes are achieved and can be a reference


**Act confidently as a networked purchase-to-pay practitioner and trusted advisor**
* Be able to continuously collect and provide both customers and others within Basware valuable guidance on best practice, industry trends and relevant benchmarks. Develop trusted relationships, including at the c-level, and engage to influence.


**Ensure successful ramp-up and adoption of Basware solutions and services**
* Provide guidance and steering decisions to the Basware and Customer implementation teams to ensure agreed upon business outcomes are met and/or mitigation strategies are activated
* Create, implement, and measure user and supplier adoption strategies linked to customer’s business outcomes. Actively measure adoption to identify and pursue opportunities. Work with customers and across internal teams, including product owners, to improve solutions and services and meet adoption objectives
* Identify opportunities where the customer would benefit from the use of additional Basware products. Work with the Sales teams in positioning the value and closing the sale of add on products and services


**Manage operational activities to ensure success**
* Be accountable for the successful delivery of success and service improvement plans, working both cross-functionally and at times leading virtual teams to deliver agreed actions in a coordinated manner and to optimize the customer experience
* Deliver services designed to drive customer success, including workshops, coaching, and profiling customer’s maturity across sourcing, procurement, and finance to identify opportunities


**Deliver and support the development of success services**
* Contribute to refining existing or develop new methodology, frameworks, and tools based on experience, research, and analysis


**Cross collaborate with the Basware Sales teams**
* Identify and create opportunities to grow the Basware pipeline
* Own the account in terms of renewals and upsells and actively drive these


 ,
   

  

 To thrive and succeed in this role, you will have significant experience in a customer facing, service-oriented role within a SaaS environment. Experience in Finance, procure-to-pay software systems and/or enterprise software applications, will be beneficial.
   

  

 This is a fast paced and dynamic environment. We value employees who are confident, work well independently and in teams, are solution focused and for who adding value for the customer is a key focus area.
   

  

**Required competencies and experience:**
* Experience in a Senior Success Manager role with demonstrated ability in driving software adoption and increasing revenue
* Experience in Continuous business improvement and value creation for the customer, through driving and optimizing the adoption. Ability to drive business outcomes discussions and lead the customers
* Experience working with global customers with local head offices and other European countries where Basware is located
* Demonstrated ability to drive and close up-selling opportunities with the customer base
* Experience of working in a global matrix organization with geographically distributed teams
* Compliance and IT Security awareness and good understanding of Security protocols
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Swedish
* Self-driven and target oriented
* Excellent presentation skills with a capability of leveraging business terms to relay solutions simply
* Ability to manage difficult situations and escalations with customers
* Bachelor's or Master's degree required


 Awareness of artificial intelligence concepts, tools, or applications is considered a strong asset. We highly value candidates who demonstrate curiosity, a proactive mindset and a willingness to explore and incorporate AI-driven technologies into their work. We support continuous learning in this area.
   

  

**Why Basware?**
 We’re a purpose-driven company with a global footprint and a collaborative culture. At Basware, you’ll work with passionate professionals, cutting-edge technology, and a shared commitment to innovation and excellence.
   

  

**Ready to make an impact?**
 If you're excited by the challenge,
 **apply now and help shape the future of Basware.**
 Please submit your resume and cover letter by clicking the ‘
 *I’m interested* 
 ’ link.
   

  

 Our recruitment process will include pre-employment actions such as an enhanced background screening by a third party and reference checks.
   

  

**Basware. Now it all just happens.**

title: AGILE COACH
description:
**Agile Coach – Driving SAS IT Transformation**
 Are you passionate about leading transformation while staying close enough to teams to make real change happen? Do you thrive in environments where you both drive direction at scale and work hands-on with teams to embed it?
   

  

 We are looking for an Agile Coach to play a key role in the continued evolution of the SAS Agile Delivery Model across Digital & IT. This is a role for someone who is not afraid to take the lead, challenge the organization, and actively drive change. While also coaching teams and leaders in their day-to-day work.
   

  

**Challenges you will work on**
 In this dynamic role, you will combine transformation leadership with hands-on coaching to ensure sustainable change across the organization. While you work hands-on with teams, this role goes beyond team-level coaching, you are expected to actively drive transformation at organizational level.
   

  

**You Will**
* Lead and drive the ongoing evolution of the SAS Agile Delivery Model
* Secure effective onboarding of product teams into new ways of working
* Facilitate and lead Quarterly Planning (PI Planning) and other large-scale alignment events
* Drive change management across Digital & IT, influencing stakeholders at all levels
* Coach and challenge product teams, Product Managers, Product Owners, Scrum Masters, and leaders
* Support teams in applying agile principles in practice to improve flow, collaboration, and value delivery
* Proactively identify gaps, inefficiencies, and improvement areas and take ownership of driving change
* Balance the need for consistency and governance with pragmatic adaptation to team contexts
* Contribute to building a strong continuous improvement of culture and agile community


**The Team**
**Role**
 You will be part of the Office of the CIO within Digital & IT, working in a high-performing and collaborative environment with colleagues from diverse backgrounds. The team plays a central role in shaping how Digital & IT operates, and you will work closely with:
   

  

* Product teams, Product Managers, Product Owners and Scrum Masters
* Leaders across business and Digital & IT
* Other Agile Coaches and transformation roles
* The Head of Agile & AD Practices and leaders within the Office of the CIO


 We value collaboration, courage, and a proactive mindset, and we support each other in driving meaningful and lasting change across SAS.
   

  

**To be successful, we believe you have**
* Proven experience in driving agile transformation in complex organizations
* The ability to combine strategic leadership with hands-on coaching
* Experience working across team, product, and portfolio levels
* Strong capability to lead change and influence senior stakeholders
* Confidence in facilitating large forums and speaking in front of diverse audiences
* A proactive and courageous mindset, you take initiative and lead from the front
* Excellent coaching, facilitation, and communication skills
* Strong stakeholder management skills across business and IT
* Solid knowledge of agile frameworks such as Scrum, Kanban, and SAFe, applied pragmatically
* Experience driving continuous improvement and building high-performing teams
* A university degree in a relevant field or equivalent professional experience
* Commitment to working from the office 3 days per week


**Why SAS?**
**Benefits**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

  

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 04/06/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As soon as possible
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process, as this role is security classified. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.


 If you have questions about this position, you are welcome to contact Helen Gothenby, Head of Agile & AD practice via; helen.gothenby@sas.se. Please note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email due to the GDPR regulations.

title: Supply Chain Inbound Manager
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimise our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As Supply Chain Inbound Manager at our Stockholm HQ, you will take ownership of the global inbound flow of goods across Acne Studios' Supply Chain. You ensure that products move from suppliers to warehouses and appointed locations in a way that is timely, cost-efficient, and sustainable. The role combines operational excellence with continuous improvement: challenging existing processes, reducing manual work, and implementing tools and ways of working that drive efficiency and transparency across the supply chain.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As Supply Chain Inbound Manager, your main responsibility is to lead and optimise inbound logistics operations, ensuring reliability, transparency, and efficiency across the global supply chain. You will report to the Supply Chain Manager EMEA and lead a team of two, driving end-to-end inbound performance by:
   

  

* Leading and developing the SC Inbound team, ensuring clear ownership, balanced workload, and continuous growth
* Overseeing global inbound flows, ensuring smooth coordination, execution and full traceability across shipments from supplier to final destination
* Owning inbound reporting frameworks, driving accuracy, relevance, and increased automation across the organization
* Ensuring timely, cost-efficient and sustainable transport solutions through optimized freight partner selection and continuous performance and cost management
* Building and maintaining strong relationships with suppliers and freight forwarders to secure high execution quality, on-time-in-full delivery and planning accuracy
* Proactively identifying and communicating risks such as delays, shortages, quality issues, or changes impacting the inbound flow
* Representing Supply Chain in commercial forums, aligning inbound flow with business priorities and key events
* Defining and enforcing logistics requirements towards suppliers, including ownership of Shipping & Packing Guidelines updates
* Driving continuous improvement of inbound processes, systems, and forecasting in collaboration with key stakeholders


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* Strong problem-solving mindset with the ability to identify root causes and drive solutions
* Highly organized, action-oriented, and attentive to detail
* Comfortable managing multiple parallel processes and understanding cross-functional dependencies
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Continuously seeks opportunities to improve and develop processes
* A collaborative team player who leads with clarity, accountability, and trust


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in business administration, supply chain, logistics, or a related field
* At least three years of professional experience within logistics or supply chain management
* Experience from retail, fashion, or global supply chain environments is a strong advantage
* Previous leadership or people management experience is meriting
* Strong IT and system capability; proficiency in ERP systems such as Microsoft D365, Dispatcher WMS, Centric PLM, and BI tools such as QlikView or Power BI is a plus
* Experience with AI, automation, and innovation is clearly meriting
* High proficiency in MS Office, particularly Excel, PowerPoint, and Word
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.

title: PR & Marketing Intern
description:
**About Transparent** 




 We're a passionate team dedicated to designing high-quality, meaningful, and beautiful speakers that seamlessly blend into any space. We believe in the power of meticulous design – every detail, from the perfect typographic balance to considered colour palettes. Transparent is more than just a word - it's a commitment to authenticity and seeing the world for what it is. Since our founding in Stockholm in 2012, we've been an independent brand challenging the unsustainable norms of the tech industry. We're looking for a like-minded PR & Marketing Intern to join our team and help craft the future of the Transparent brand.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 As our PR & Marketing Intern, you'll work closely with our founders, and play a key role in refining our global social presence. You'll be responsible for supporting with copywriting, Gifting activities, social media curation and everything in between. As we are a small and dynamic team you will also be asked to help out in other areas where it makes sense. We seek passionate, ambitious, smart, and, above all, kind individuals. We welcome those from diverse backgrounds with different perspectives on problem-solving.
 



  





**What You'll Do:** 




 ●
 **Social Media Coordination** 
 : Support the planning, production, and scheduling of engaging content across social platforms, including Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Youtube, and paid media channels
 



 ●
 **PR & Gifting** 
 : Supporting incoming gifting requests, aswell as supporting reachouts
 



 ●
 **Copywriting** 
 : Help develop our tone of voice on our social media platforms that reflect the brand’s tone and visual identity
 



  





**Who You Are:** 




 ● A creative thinker with a discerning eye for design and an understanding of the social media landscape (TikTok, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube)
 



 ● Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Marketing, Communications, Fashion, Media, Public Relations, or a related field
 



 ● Results-oriented with the ability to meet deadlines
 



 ● Willing to learn and grow in a dynamic and fast-moving environment
 



 ● Reliable and meticulous in your work
 



  





**What We Offer:** 




 ●
 **Real-World Experience** 
 : Gain hands-on experience working closely with the founders of a growing company that celebrates meticulous, detail-oriented design work.
 



 ●
 **Mentorship and Growth** 
 : Learn the ins and outs of building a successful, progressive and value driven brand identity
 



 ●
 **Dynamic and global environment** 
 : Transparent work on many exciting collaborative projects across the world with some of the biggest names in music and the creative industry.
 



 ●
 **Creative Impact** 
 : See your ideas and designs come to life and have a direct impact on a brand that values creativity.
 



  





**Start** 
 : September - January 2026
 



**Location:** 
 Södermalm, Sweden
 



  





 This is an unpaid position with potential growing into a part or full-time position upon successful completion of the 6 month internship.

title: Devops Engineer
description:
*Studies show that women and underrepresented groups often hesitate to apply unless they meet every requirement. At* 
 Stegra, we’re building an impact-driven, sustainable company - and we need a diverse, inclusive team to make it happen.
   

  

*If you share our passion but* 
 don’t meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply anyway. You might be the perfect fit for this role, or another as we grow.
   

  

 At Stegra, we’re not just building a plant, we’re proving that sustainable industry is possible. And to do that, we need people like you.
   

  

 Join a team where safety comes first. Where we support each other, learn as we go, and make space for everyone to grow and contribute. This is your chance to be part of something big - while being closer to nature and leading a balanced, purposeful life.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 Right now, we are looking for a Devops Engineer for our Digital Site Services. In this role you will report to our Digital Domain Manager and sit within our Digital function. The team is responsible for deliver secure, resilient, and innovative infrastructure solutions, including fully redundant datacenters. As our Devops Engineer, you’ll play a vital role in designing and maintaining the systems that power our Digital Factory. Based in Boden and part of Strega’s dynamic digital team, you’ll ensure our platforms drive productivity, safety, and sustainability.
   

  

 Specific to this role, the day-to-day tasks will include the following but as we are a growing company with very little silos between teams, other tasks might be included as well.
   

  

* Oversee the deployment, commissioning, and configuration of digital infrastructure
* Configure and operate servers, storage, backup systems, datacenter support functions, as well as virtualization environments (both on-premises and in the cloud).
* Work closely with team members and vendors to design digital infrastructure and implement best practices.
* Define operational processes for monitoring and maintaining infrastructure, ensuring secure, efficient, and reliable operations.
* Develop plans for maintenance and support to minimize downtime and ensure smooth operations.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business needs, prioritize infrastructure requirements, and ensure the safe and robust platform while improving productivity, safety, and sustainability in the factory.
* Create and document best practices, and mentor team members to foster growth and improve infrastructure operations.
* Participate in an on-call rotation together with other team members to support the 24/7 operation of critical infrastructure.


**What You’ll Bring**
 We’re seeking someone with a proactive and collaborative mindset who thrives in a dynamic environment. You excel at problem-solving, organization, and clear communication, especially when explaining technical solutions to non-technical stakeholders. Empathy for end-users and a passion for creating technology that improves their daily work are key traits we value.
   

  

 Specific to this role, we would like to see that you can tick off a fair amount of the boxes below
   

  

* A University degree or equivalent experience, Bachelor or Master’s in Engineering or Computer Science.
* Relevant experience in datacenter operations.
* Hands-on experience with configuring and managing virtualization environments such as VMware / Nutanix.
* Hands-on experience in Infrastructure provisioning and configuration management via infrastructure as code (IaC) – Ansible / Terraform.
* Hands-on experience with Kubernetes for Containers management, deployment and scaling.
* Knowledge of Cybersecurity best practices, and experience in analyzing possible threats and vulnerabilities, embedding security standards, monitoring adherence to them, and implementing disaster recovery plans.
* Experience with Active Directory and Users management systems.
* Very good experience with AWS services configuration and management.
* Experience with performance monitoring and troubleshooting for hosts, servers, databases, virtual machines, containers.
* Good knowledge of networks and network protocols.
* Experience with Data Backup solutions.
* Experience with administration of Linux and Windows based systems
* Experience in writing scripts with at least one scripting language - such as Python, Java, JavaScript, etc.
* Experience with OT infrastructure such as Historians, HMI, Scada, Edge gateways.
* Experience with Agile and DevOps methodologies, and with Continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) platforms.


**Location:** 
 Boden, Sweden
   

  

**Benefits At Stegra**
 At Stegra, you’ll join a company where your work has real impact on the climate, the industry, and future generations. We’re building a culture rooted in safety, trust, and inclusion, where people feel supported to grow and thrive.
   

  

 You’ll receive fair, competitive compensation aligned with collective agreements, along with benefits like up to 30 days of paid vacation, occupational pension, parental benefits, and insurance. If you need support with relocation or immigration, our relocation department will help guide you through the process, whether it’s permits, housing or other practical matters. You can also enjoy perks like subsidized gym memberships and bike leases, plus the everyday benefits of life closer to nature.
   

  

**Read More About Benefits At Stegra Here.**
**This is Stegra**
 Stegra is on a mission to change the global steel industry by producing green hydrogen, iron, and steel - with the goal of eliminating CO₂ emissions. Instead of coal, we use green hydrogen and fossil-free electricity, meaning our primary emissions will be water and heat.
   

  

 By 2030, our ambition is to produce 5 million tonnes of green steel annually in our fully integrated, digitized, and sustainable plant in Boden, Northern Sweden - currently under construction. But this is just the beginning. Our expertise in green hydrogen will enable us to decarbonize industries beyond steel, paving the way for a cleaner future.
   

  

**Our Boden Site**
 Our Boden site is located just west of Boden City, right in the heart of a growing green industrial hub in Northern Sweden. It’s where we’re building one of the world’s most modern, sustainable steel plants - designed with safety, efficiency, and people in mind. With just a 10-minute commute from town, you'll be close to both cutting-edge technology and the everyday convenience of living near nature, schools, and community life.
   

  

 Boden Video
   

  

**Our Stockholm Office**
 Our modern Stockholm office is located on Norra Stationsgatan, close to Karolinska University Hospital in central Stockholm. Here, you’ll find a bright, collaborative workspace where cross-functional teams connect, share ideas, and drive progress. Whether you're visiting regularly or working hybrid, you'll be part of a vibrant office culture with easy access to the city’s energy and amenities.
   

  

*Founded in 2020, Stegra (formerly H2 Green Steel) was created with the purpose to decarbonize hard-to-abate industry. Construction of our first project – an integrated plant producing green hydrogen, green iron and green steel – is well underway in Boden, Sweden. Slashing emissions using green hydrogen and renewable electricity, we’re starting a clean industrial revolution. Steel is just the beginning. Together, we focus on delivering green impact – for our people, customers, investors, society and planet.*

title: Financial Controller
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

**Are you ready to take on a broad and senior finance role in an international and project driven environment?** 
 We are now looking for a skilled and proactive Financial Controller to join our finance team in Solna. In this role, you will work closely with both the accounting and controlling teams and take ownership of financial controlling, project accounting, IFRS related reporting, and support towards several international entities within the SSC Space group.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys combining hands-on accounting work with analytical finance responsibilities, while collaborating with stakeholders across different countries and business areas.
   

  

**Requirements**
* University degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field.
* Solid experience within accounting and financial controlling.
* Good knowledge of IFRS, preferably including IFRS 15.
* Experience working in an international environment with multiple entities.
* Experience collaborating with external auditors, accounting firms, or tax advisors.
* Strong analytical skills and a structured way of working.
* Comfortable taking ownership and driving work independently.
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with different stakeholders.
* Professional fluency in English, both written and spoken.


**Responsibilities**
* Perform financial controlling activities in close collaboration with the accounting and controlling teams.
* Take responsibility for Percentage of Completion (POC) calculations for customer projects.
* Follow up and ensure compliance with IFRS 15 related to project revenue recognition.
* Act as the Senior Company Accountant for SSC Space Australia and serve as the main contact towards local accounting firms and external auditors. Prepare financial statements, accruals, and provisions. Reconcile current tax and deferred tax.
* Collaborate closely with internal stakeholders as well as external auditors and tax advisors.


**Benefits**
* A broad and responsible role combining financialcontrolling, accounting, IFRS, and project finance.
* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
