So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Partner Account Manager
description:
**Job Description**
**Reshape How We Grow and Evolve Partnerships in the ISV Ecosystem**
 At Nexi, partnerships are not transactional—they’re foundational to how we serve millions of European businesses. As our Partner Account Manager for Independent Software Vendors, you’ll play a key role in strengthening long‑term relationships, expanding our ISV ecosystem, and shaping the future of payment integrations.
   

  

 While part of your work will involve identifying new partners, your greatest impact will come from nurturing and transforming the partners already within our network. You’ll help established ISVs modernize their integration models, uncover new joint revenue opportunities, and define shared pathways to success. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on curiosity, values strong relationships, and is driven by sustained, long‑term growth.
   

  

**Why This Role Is Right for You**
 Our ISV ecosystem is diverse and full of untapped potential. Many partners are ready to evolve—whether that means adopting modern integration capabilities, exploring smarter monetization models, or aligning more deeply with our commercial strategies.
   

  

 Rather than focusing solely on aggressive acquisition, we are looking for someone who recognizes the opportunity to elevate the partnerships we already have. You will still bring in select high‑value ISVs, but the heart of this role lies in strengthening, modernizing, and scaling the relationships that define Nexi’s European presence.
   

  

**About Your Future Role**
 In this position, you will:
   

  

**Grow and Deepen Strategic Partnerships**
 You’ll work closely with our existing ISV partners to build long‑term, trust‑based relationships and uncover new revenue opportunities within the current portfolio. A key part of your remit is guiding partners as they shift from legacy integrations toward more modern, scalable commercial and technical models. Throughout this process, you’ll collaborate with partners to define shared success metrics that support growth for both sides.
   

  

**Selective Acquisition of High‑Value ISVs**
 Although the role focuses primarily on existing partnerships, you will also identify a small number of new ISVs that complement and strengthen our ecosystem. This includes developing well‑reasoned business cases grounded in long‑term value creation and leading negotiations that prioritize collaboration and relationship‑building.
   

  

**Drive Commercial & Technical Evolution**
 To support our partners effectively, you’ll immerse yourself in their business models, integration needs, and product roadmaps. You’ll collaborate with internal product and technical teams to ensure integrations are aligned with modern best practices and jointly design go‑to‑market approaches that accelerate growth. A crucial part of this work involves balancing commercial ambition with technical feasibility and smart prioritization.
   

  

**Shape How Nexi Partners Across Europe**
 Your insights from partners and market trends will help influence Nexi’s wider product development and commercial strategy. You’ll challenge outdated processes, introduce new partnership models, and contribute to scaling successful programs across multiple regions. You’ll also help align internal stakeholders around shared objectives that reinforce long‑term partner success.
   

  

**Champion Curiosity, Creativity & Problem‑Solving**
 You’ll bring a solution‑oriented mindset to every challenge, showing genuine curiosity about our partners’ businesses and the industries they serve. Creativity will be essential as you discover practical, meaningful ways to strengthen relationships and deliver mutual value.
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
 We’re looking for someone eager to make a difference. Here’s what we value:
   

  

**Essential Qualifications**
* 8+ years in partnership management, business development, or software‑focused commercial roles
* Demonstrated experience deepening and expanding strategic partnerships
* Ability to navigate complex, multi‑stakeholder environments
* Background working with ISVs, software vendors, or integration‑driven partners
* Proven ability to influence revenue through partnership channels
* Fluency in English and Swedish


**Bonus Skills**
* Experience with ISVs in retail, hospitality, ERP, or vertical SaaS
* Comfort working with technical teams and discussing integration requirements
* Understanding of software ecosystem economics and vertical value chains


*Even if you don’t meet every requirement, your curiosity, adaptability, and partnership mindset may make you an excellent fit.*
**What’s In It For You**
 You’ll have strategic influence within one of Europe’s largest payment companies, gain exposure to major industry developments, and work with a highly experienced, international team.
   

  

**Discover Life at Nexi**
 We’re an international team of 10,000+ people across 25 countries, united by shared ambition and a passion for innovation. Learn more about our culture, Values, and how we’re shaping the future of digital payments. Visit our Life at Nexi page.
   

  

**Diversity and Inclusion at Nexi**
 We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer: together, we succeed by embracing our differences and creating a future where everyone can thrive.
   

  

**Your Next Step Starts Here**
 If this opportunity excites you, we’d love to hear your story. Submit your application today, and let’s shape the future of digital payments together!

title: Mergers and Acquisitions Associate
description:
Vitec Software Group is a leading provider of business-critical software for vertical markets and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Large Cap. We grow both through the development of our business units and through acquisitions, which is an important part of the Group’s success.
 



  





 We are now looking to strengthen our M&A team with a colleague who wants to develop within acquisitions and business analysis.
 



  





 Because we acquire companies to keep them within the Group, it’s essential that we share fundamental values, business models and strategies. We therefore place great importance on building relationships and getting to know the people behind the companies before making any acquisition decisions. If you appreciate that approach, this could be the right opportunity for you.
 



  





 Our well-considered long-term acquisitions make it possible for small and medium-sized software companies to continue developing. With great respect for each company’s unique industry knowledge and need for independence, we provide long-term stability, shared expertise, experience and common resources.
 



  





**About the role** 




 As an M&A Associate, you will step into a central role and contribute directly to Vitec’s future growth. You will have a varied working day, taking part in every stage of the acquisition process – from identifying potential targets, analysis and negotiations, to due diligence, completion and handover to the operational business.
 



  





 You will work across a broad network of contacts and gain insight into various industries and markets. Your primary focus will be in one or several of the regions Nordics, Benelux, DACH and Poland.
 



  





**What we offer** 




 As you join our tight team, you’ll receive a thorough introduction. We then work together to help you grow into your role. In the role you will interact with our senior executives throughout the organization.
 



  





 At Vitec, we combine a long-term perspective with a decentralized structure, giving you both stability and the opportunity to grow.
 



 You will:
 


* Build a strong foundation within M&A and business analysis
* Develop your commercial understanding and communication skills
* Gain exposure to a wide variety of companies and industries
* Be part of a team that values collaboration, trust and continuous learning



  





 If you are looking for a role where you can learn, take responsibility, and grow over time, we believe you will thrive with us.
 



  





**Who you are** 




 To succeed in the role, you have a relevant academic master’s degree – for example, in one or several of the fields engineering, management, finance or business administration.
 



  





 You have recently graduated and/or have up to 2 years of relevant work experience. This may include experience gained through internships, part-time roles, or early-career positions within consulting, finance, or a related field. Experience from software companies is an advantage.
 



  





 We believe that you:
 


* Have a genuine interest in business, strategy and acquisitions
* Are analytical and comfortable working with financial information
* Communicate clearly and build trust with ease
* Are proactive, structured and persistent
* Enjoy combining hands-on work with collaboration



  





 You are fluent in English (required), and Swedish is preferred. Additional language skills—particularly Polish or Dutch—are considered an advantage.
 



  





 As an M&A Associate, you’ll need both drive and patience, as well as the ability to communicate with attentiveness and clarity. We value a focus on quality, respect and humility – qualities that are important both within Vitec and in our cooperation with other companies. If this sounds like you, we think you’ll feel at home with us.
 



  





**Practical information** 



* Location: Stockholm (Kungsholmen)
* The role includes travel
* Start date: As agreed



  





**Interested?** 




 We look forward to receiving your application, including your CV and a short cover letter explaining your interest in the role.
 



  





 The last day to apply is August 9, 2026.
 



  





 If you would like to know more, you’re welcome to contact Aleš Zobec, Head of M&A, at ales.zobec@vitecsoftware.com
 



  





 We will contact the candidates we would like to invite for an interview in early August.

title: Director Powertrain & Electronics Engineering
description:
**Want to shape the future of waterborne transport and join a world-class team?**
 Candela is the
 **global leader in electric hydrofoil vessels** 
 . Since 2014, we’ve gone from building our first premium electric speedboat in a small Stockholm workshop to delivering game-changing vessels around the globe.
 **The Candela P-12** 
 is our latest innovation - the world’s first electric hydrofoil ferry is not just operating in Stockholm, but now attracting orders from around the world.
   

  

 Our boats “fly” thanks to
 **computer-guided** 
 underwater wings under the hull made out of
 **lightweight carbon fiber.** 
 The wings lift the vessel above the water, which results in cutting energy use by up to 80%, while offering zero emissions and a far better passenger experience than traditional diesel vessels.
   

  

 And that’s exactly why we do this. Our mission is clear: to
 **speed up the transition to fossil fuel–free lakes and oceans** 
 .
   

  

 You can be part of the amazing team in Candela now! We are looking for a Powertrain & Electronics Engineering Director to support Candela’s future growth ambitions. You will lead a team of highly skilled engineers and own the electrical propulsion and electronics platform—charging, batteries, inverters and our in-house POD motor, plus the electronics architecture spanning system design, PCB design, HMI and harness. You will report to the VP R&D and be a part of the Research & Development management team.
   

  

**Your core responsibilities will include:**
* Own the Powertrain & Electronics Engineering deliverables (performance, quality, speed)
* Build capabilities across power electronics, batteries, electric machines and control electronics (architecture, PCB, HMI, harness)
* Set the long-term technical roadmap (resources, budget, partnerships)
* With Test & Verification, ensure a strong test strategy and execution for the powertrain system and electronics architecture
* Represent the domain in key internal and supplier discussions
* Identify, communicate and mitigate risks across design, development and implementation
* Plan and coordinate team activities based on priorities and strengths
* Drive competence development, appraisals and salary reviews


**Requirements:**
* Hold a Master’s degree in Electrical, Mechatronics or similar
* Have 3+ years of experience leading engineering teams
* Have strong fundamentals in batteries, electric machines, power electronics integration and/or electronics architecture (system/PCB/HMI/harness)
* Have experience creating and executing development/validation test plans (incl. standards and regulatory needs) for powertrain systems and/or electronics
* Stay current on electric machines, batteries and related sub-systems
* Have experience with standards and regulatory requirements for battery packs and/or electronics development and validation
* Experience with simulation/analysis tools (e.g., structural, electromagnetic, thermal) and/or safety-critical electronics development


**What are we looking for?**
 You are a collaborative and hands-on engineering leader who thrives in fast-paced and technically complex environments. You combine strong technical judgement with a structured and analytical mindset, enabling you to stay focused and thorough while balancing quality, innovation and execution. Goal-oriented and driven by results, you persevere through challenges and bring teams together through clear communication, sound decision-making and a continuous improvement mindset.
   

  

**Form of employment** 
 : Full-time with initial 6 month probation period
   

  

**Start date:** 
 ASAP
   

  

**Location/base** 
 : Rotebro/Frihamnen
   

  

**Team** 
 : Research & Development
   

  

**Reporting to** 
 : VP R&D
   

  

**Why people love working at Candela?**
 At Candela, we’re not just building electric vessels - we’re creating a whole new category of clean, efficient waterborne transport. You get the chance to work with
 **cutting-edge technology** 
 , solving complex challenges, and seeing the results in action - sometimes literally, when we organize test rides for our newcomers! We’re a diverse and ambitious team of over 50 nationalities, united by a
 **revolutionary spirit and kindness** 
 . That means we work hard, but always with humility and while having fun - whether it’s solving a manufacturing challenge, improving processes, or cheering each other on during
 **Candela Months** 
 , our year-round calendar of bonding activities and events.
   

  

 We’re
 **office-first but not office-only** 
 . We believe collaboration is most powerful when we build together, in person - but we also trust our team to work in ways that fit their life. At Candela, you’ll find a place where bold ideas are welcomed, great people are celebrated, and the ride is just as important as the destination.
   

  

**Recruitment process:**
 We aim to keep our recruitment process as straightforward and efficient as possible. As an international company with English as our corporate language, the entire process is conducted in English. Therefore, please submit your application in our corporate language as well. Kindly note that we cannot process applications sent via email due to GDPR so please use our career website for you application.
   

  

**We welcome the opportunity to meet you!**

title: Skoladministratör till Realgymnasiet i Stockholm
description:
*Vi vet att meningsfullt lärande börjar med elevernas personliga intressen. Genom att förena intresse med kunskap skapar vi utbildningar som både inspirerar, engagerar och förbereder våra elever för framtiden – oavsett om det gäller arbetslivet eller vidare studier. Vi samarbetar nära branschen och arbetar aktivt för att ge varje elev de bästa förutsättningarna att utvecklas och lyckas, under skoltiden och i framtiden.*
**Vi söker dig som är skoladministratör**
 Vi söker nu en skoladministratör som vill vara med och fortsätta utveckla vår gymnasieskola i Liljeholmen. I rollen kommer du att arbeta nära skolans rektor och biträdande rektorer samt i samverkan med övrig personal. Du blir en viktig länk i skolans organisation och ansvarar för att stötta verksamheten med olika administrativa uppgifter. Du kommer att ingå i ett arbetslag med ytterligare en administratör, IT-tekniker, kommunikatör och vaktmästare.
   

  

 En central del i uppdraget är att arbeta i våra administrativa system, där du bidrar till att skapa struktur och kvalitet i skolans processer. Arbetsuppgifterna kan omfatta allt från elev- och personaladministration så som CSN-rapportering och registrering av betyg, arbete med studieplaner, ekonomi- och systemstöd samt service till elever, personal och skolledning i frågor som rör den dagliga driften. I rollen ingår även arbete med den dagliga vikariesamordningen. Uppdraget kan dessutom innebära att samordna praktiska ärenden kopplade till skolans fastigheter och fysiska miljö.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av skoladministrativt arbete på gymnasieutbildning och har god kännedom om dess styrdokument. Meriterande om du har arbetet med yrkesprogram. Du är van att arbeta i olika administrativa system och schemaläggningsprogram. Vi värdesätter att du uttrycker dig väl i svenska, både i tal och skrift, då rollen innebär kontinuerlig kontakt med både interna och externa parter.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 För att vara aktuell för uppdraget ser vi att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av administrativt arbete inom gymnasieskola.
* Kännedom om gymnasieskolans styrdokument och regelverk.
* God vana att arbeta i digitala system och administrativa verktyg inom gymnasieskolans administration.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i både tal och skrift.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, noggrant och självständigt.
* God samarbetsförmåga och serviceinriktat förhållningssätt.


 Det är meriterande med
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med yrkesprogram på gymnasieskola.
* Kunskap eller erfarenhet av schemaläggningsprogram på gymnasieskola.
* Eftergymnasial utbildning med inriktning mot administration eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av att hantera frågor kopplade till fastigheter eller lokalservice.


 Vi söker dig som delar Lärandes kärnvärden- trygghet, utveckling, team och framgång. Du har en god samarbetsförmåga är flexibel och förändringsorienterad med siktet inställt på mål och resultat.
   

  

*Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning, vi tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning.*
**Varför välja Lärande?**
 Vår framgång bygger på trygghet, teamkänsla och ständig utveckling. Hos oss är mod, nya idéer och kunskapsutbyten viktiga delar av vår kultur, och vi ser olikheter som en styrka. Sedan starten har vi gått vår egen väg och vi ser lärande som nyckeln till att möta en värld i ständig förändring. Genom nära samarbeten med näringslivet, branscher och andra aktörer så lär vi för morgondagen.
   

  

 Sök till oss och bli en del av Lärande - där din insats gör skillnad!
   

  

 Anställningens omfattning
   

  

 Tillträde: 2026-08-04
   

  

 Eller enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Ansök nu

title: Channel Sales Manager
description:
Imagine yourself…
   

  

* Doing meaningful work that makes an everyday impact on the world around you.
* Thriving in a supportive global team environment that inspires you to strive for excellence.
* Joining a company with a proven track record of success and an exciting future.


 It’s possible with a role at Sea-Bird Scientific. Headquartered in Bellevue, Washington,
 **Sea-Bird Scientific** 
 , a Veralto company, is the world’s largest developer and manufacturer of products for the measurement of salinity, temperature, pressure, dissolved oxygen, fluorescence, nutrients and related oceanographic parameters in marine waters. We offer products to support best-in-class oceanography and climate science. We offer an entrepreneurial environment that is team-centered, customer-driven, quality-focused, and growth-oriented.
   

  

 At Sea-Bird Scientific and Veralto, you’ll be part of a unique culture and work environment
 **where purpose meets possibility** 
 : where the work you do every day directly supports the health and sustainability of our oceans and their ecosystems, and where you’ll have access to robust opportunities to deepen your skillset and develop your career.
   

  

**We offer:**
* Flexible working hours
* Professional onboarding and training options
* Powerful team looking forward to working with you
* Career coaching and development opportunities
* Health benefits
* 401(k)


 Reporting into the Director of Sales, the
 **Channel Sales Manager** 
 is responsible for driving revenue through Sea-Bird’s strategic distributor partners across Europe, the Middle East and Canada. This role is about building true growth partnerships with channel partners by aligning strategy, enabling execution and influencing outcomes without direct authority. This is a hands-on, externally facing role that requires strong commercial judgment and professional selling instincts, ability to leverage technical product knowledge around oceanographic applications and the ability to partner credibly with distributor leadership while navigating internal teams to deliver results.
   

  

 This position is part of the
 *Sales department,* 
 and will be remote, with up to 50% travel required. We're ideally looking for someone based in Europe.
   

  

**In this role, a typical day will look like:**
* Own and manage a defined portfolio of strategic Sea-Bird channel partners across EMEA and Canada
* Influence the behavior of these key channel partners to achieve revenue growth targets
* Proactively identify new growth opportunities within the assigned geography
* Actively manage channel opportunity funnels and provide support in closing strategic opportunities
* Provide product and applications training and support to channel partners and customers
* Act as the voice of the distributor with Sea-Bird and work cross-functionally to resolve issues and improve the customer and channel partner experience
* Maintain clear, proactive and professional communication with channels and internal stakeholders


**The essential requirements of the job include:**
* Bachelor’s in science and/or engineering preferred
* 5-10 years of experience in a technical B2B sales environment with meaningful exposure to channel or distributor-led models
* Experience managing complex relationships across geographies and cultures
* Proven track record of professional selling and opportunity development skills
* Product and applications acumen with oceanographic background preferred
* Ability to travel up to 50% within the assigned territory.


 Sea-Bird Scientific is proud to part of the Water Quality segment of Veralto (NYSE: VLTO), a $5B global leader dedicated to ensuring access to clean water, safe food and medicine, and trusted essential goods. When you join Veralto’s vibrant global network of 17,000 associates, you join a unique culture and work environment
 *where purpose meets possibility* 
 : where the work you do has an everyday impact on the resources and essentials we all rely on, and where you’ll have valuable opportunities to deepen your skillset, pursue your ambitions, and grow your career. Together, we’re Safeguarding the World’s Most Vital Resources™—and building rewarding careers along the way.
   

  

 At Veralto, we value diversity and the existence of similarities and differences, both visible and not, found in our workforce, workplace and throughout the markets we serve. Our associates, customers and shareholders contribute unique and different perspectives as a result of these diverse attributes.
   

  

**Unsolicited Assistance**
 We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at any of the Veralto companies, in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position, approved by Talent Acquisition, will be deemed the sole property of Veralto and its companies. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Veralto and its companies because of the unsolicited referral.

title: Tax Technology Specialist
description:
*Do you want to help shape the future of tax advisory? KPMG offers a unique opportunity to take a leading role in the growth of their tax transformation business. You'll work closely with Nordic and global networks in a flexible culture. Together, we make a real impact – for our clients, the industry, and your career.*
**The Role**
 KPMG Sweden is seeking an experienced and dynamic Tax Technology Specialist to join the Tax Transformation team. In this role, you will leverage your expertise in tax technology and data management to support clients in developing and implementing innovative tax solutions. You will play a critical role in building out our practice to support our client in shaping their tax data strategy, creating tax technology roadmaps, and guiding them through vendor selections. This is an exciting opportunity to be part of building out our practice, driving business development, and enhancing the value of our services.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Lead KPMG Sweden’s Tax Technology and Tax Data Management practice including developing and implementing innovative data-driven strategies to address client challenges and opportunities.
* Collaborate with clients to develop a comprehensive tax data strategy that aligns with their overall business objectives. This involves understanding their unique tax data landscape and challenges. Analyse their tax data maturity, identify gaps, and define data needs that align with their business objectives.
* Collaborate with clients to develop a tailored roadmap for optimizing their tax data management. This might involve recommending and implementing new technologies, data cleansing procedures, and automation tools.
* Collaborate with both client tax and finance departments to integrate tax technology solutions that enhance compliance processes and unlock valuable insights from their data.
* Partner with compliance and process specialists to identify opportunities for automating manual tasks and streamlining client tax and finance workflows and processes.
* Leverage your tax and technology expertise to identify new client opportunities for Tax Transformation services by leveraging existing client relationships, identifying new opportunities and effectively communicating the value of our tax transformation services.
* Build a collaborative and inclusive team environment that promotes continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and innovative thinking within the Tax Technology practice.


 The role is based in the office on Vasagatan in Stockholm, for the right person placement in another location is possible.
   

  

 At KPMG, you become part of a corporate culture where the individual is important. KPMG offers great development opportunities in a diverse environment where you will be challenged through exciting and socially important involvement with clients. You are offered a varied and responsible role where the pace is often high, with many opportunities for stimulating social contacts, constant change and knowledge development. KPMG offers a comprehensive internal training and development program with the opportunity to develop within your areas of interest.
   

  

 ,
   

  

 We are seeking a professional with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Information Technology, Accounting, Finance, Taxation, or a related field. Professional certifications such as CPA, CA, or an equivalent designation are highly preferred. The ideal candidate will have more than five years of hands-on experience in tax technology, data management, or a related role, preferably gained within leading consulting firms—such as the Big Four—or multinational corporations. A proven track record in leading and implementing tax technology or data management solutions is considered a strong advantage.
   

  

 A solid understanding of tax data management and compliance processes, along with familiarity with tax technology platforms, is essential. This includes experience with data analytics tools, data lakes, data warehouses, and data engineering platforms such as Databricks, as well as tax provision and compliance software. The candidate should demonstrate excellent analytical skills and possess a deep understanding of financial data, accounting systems, and financial operations.
   

  

 We value individuals who are passionate about driving digital transformation in finance and tax, and who bring a forward-thinking mindset with a willingness to challenge established processes in order to foster innovation. Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills are critical for success in this role. Moreover, the ability to identify and act upon new business opportunities, build and maintain client relationships, and collaborate effectively within cross-functional teams is essential.
   

  

**Do you want to know more?**
 In this process KPMG is working with Level Recruitment. To apply, please click the apply button. If you have further questions don´t hesitate to contact recruitment consultant Dennis Pater at +46 735 58 89 34 or Christian Smith at +46 8-120 50 410. Please note that we need your application written in English. We will interview ongoingly so please register your application as soon as possible.

title: Group Accounting & Reporting Intern
description:
Finance
   

  

 Internship / Global Electrolux Talent (GET)
   

  

**Job Description**
**Internship duration: 6 months**
 At Electrolux, going to work every day is more than launching the latest product or technology. It’s about improving the everyday lives of millions of people. By staying curious, humble, and open to new ideas, we push the boundaries of cooking, cleaning, and wellbeing at home.
   

  

 To continue this journey, we are looking for talented students who want to learn, contribute, and grow in a truly global environment. We believe that diverse perspectives create better ideas and stronger teams — and we welcome you to be part of that.
   

  

**About The Role**
 All financial information in the Electrolux Group is reported to and consolidated at Group Accounting & Reporting (GA&R) in Stockholm. We prepare the consolidated accounts for the Group and produce the annual and quarterly reports in close collaboration with Group Business Control (GBC) and Investor Relations (IR). GA&R is responsible for the systems used for reporting, consolidation (AARO) and output reports (Workiva). We are now looking for an intern to support the Group Accounting & Reporting team. The role is reporting to the Head of Group Accounting & Reporting at Electrolux Group and will be based at our global headquarters in Stockholm.
   

  

**Typical day**
 It’s quite certain that no day is like the other one. Many different activities within financial reporting and consolidation will come your way during your time with us at Electrolux Group Accounting & Reporting. You will be working closely together with an experienced and dedicated team, sometimes with a high workload but always with great teamship and a positive mindset.
   

  

**Main tasks**
 You will be involved in
 *system-related activities* 
 such as system administration of AARO – our system for financial reporting and consolidation – and Workiva – our system for production of external reports.
   

  

* User administration (adding/removing/changing users & user rights etc.)
* User support (related to how to report, what to report etc. - not IT issues)
* Preparing systems for reporting (setting up periods, forms, packages etc.)


 You will also participate in
 *external reporting activities* 
 related to the production of external reports: quarterly interim reports and annual reports.
   

  

* Transferring data from AARO to Workiva
* Checking comparative information
* Updating numbers and text sections in Workiva
* Proof-reading English and Swedish versions
* Parallel reading of English and Swedish versions
* Supporting the annual report project manager


 You will also get involved in the monthly reporting and consolidation process, projects concerning new reporting requirements as well as continuous improvements to make sure we perform our work effectively.
   

  

**Experience/qualifications**
* Actively enrolled for the all duration of the internship in a Bachelor OR Master degree in finance/business administration/accounting.
* Genuine interest in learning from Group Accounting & Reporting.
* Fluent in Swedish.
* Strong English skills, oral and written.


**Where you will be:**
**Primary location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

 This is a full-time position, based in our Global Headquarters in Stockholm (Sweden).
   

  

 We are proud of our culture of inclusivity and diversity. At our Global Headquarters we have 60+ nationalities working together for our common goals. You will be part of this dynamic international team where English is the natural language.

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**Enable Toptracer’s world-leading technology to scale globally and deliver more FUN to the world** 




  





**ABOUT US** 




**Our mission** 
 is to help people enjoy the wonderful game of golf even more by developing tracing technology for TV and gamification to ranges. Our product brings people together and encourages them to get active which enables a healthier lifestyle. Our range technology is used globally and millions of people spend their quality time bonding and playing with their family and friends. Our broadcast technology is aired worldwide and makes the tournaments really enjoyable for the TV viewers. ⛳️ 📺 🎥
 



  





**At our new office** 
 , you can expect to meet humble, helpful and driven colleagues. You will join an organization where everyone has a voice and can make an impact. You'll have the opportunity to contribute to something meaningful as we undergo exciting changes and growth. We are committed to creating a positive and social work environment by creating fun activities like morning fika, gym sessions, mob programming, after-work, table tennis, and golf simulator sessions to name a few! 🥳 🏓 ☕️
 



  





**We are proud** 
 to be on a journey where we're focused on helping people worldwide improve their golf game which leads to healthy, active and social lifestyles. All of our products are developed, tested and deployed from our newly renovated R&D office in Stockholm, Sweden. Join us at Toptracer Technologies and be part of a team dedicated to creating positive change through technology and innovation! 🚀 💻 💙
 



  





**THE ROLE** 




 The Software Operations team is looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to help build and operate the platforms, tools, and automation that enable Toptracer’s global growth. You will work across software development, infrastructure, and operations, driving technical decisions while remaining hands-on with coding, automation, and platform engineering. A key part of the role is designing and operating large-scale Kubernetes environments running primarily on on-premises infrastructure, with a focus on reliability, scalability, and efficiency.
 



  





 Together with the team, you will develop the systems that remove operational bottlenecks, improve productivity, and enable Toptracer to scale worldwide. You will contribute to architecture, automation, deployment strategies, and engineering best practices while collaborating closely with both development and operations teams. This is an opportunity to make a significant impact on the platform and software architecture of a global technology company alongside a team of passionate engineers solving complex challenges at scale.
 



  





**FREQUENT TECH STACK** 



* Large-scale Kubernetes platform running primarily on self-managed and on-prem infrastructure
* Linux-based development and production environments
* Python for backend services, automation, and operational tooling
* Docker and containerized platforms
* Bash and Python for scripting and automation
* Automated provisioning of physical and virtual infrastructure
* Netbooted servers, devices, and operational network environments



  





**OCCASIONAL TECH STACK** 



* AWS and hybrid cloud infrastructure
* GitLab CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment workflows
* Flask, FastAPI, and Django for API development
* PostgreSQL for database solutions



  





**POSSIBILITIES** 



* Work in an autonomous team with smart, engaged, driven, and collaborative colleagues
* Build tooling and automation that make a significant impact on the business
* Drive architectural, operational, and infrastructure decisions within the team
* Help shape deployment strategies and engineering best practices
* Collaborate closely with development, infrastructure, and operations teams
* Gain a broad understanding of Toptracer’s technology ecosystem
* Be part of a team and organization that embraces continuous improvement and change
* Enable Toptracer’s world-leading technology to scale globally and deliver more FUN to the world



  





**WE BELIEVE YOU HAVE** 




**Prioritized skills** 



* Strong experience developing, operating, and maintaining large-scale Kubernetes platforms in self-managed or on-prem infrastructure environments
* Several years of experience developing for Linux environments and working close to operational infrastructure
* Strong backend programming skills in Python, with experience building scalable automation, tooling, and APIs
* Experience with AWS and building CI/CD pipelines for Linux environments
* Strong understanding of infrastructure automation, containerized environments, and platform scalability across both development and operations
* Experience designing scalable operational tooling and automation workflows
* Ability to understand large distributed systems and how components integrate across infrastructure and software layers
* Strong communication and knowledge-sharing abilities, with experience mentoring and supporting team members
* Interest in software architecture while still enjoying hands-on coding
* Ability to contribute to architectural decisions, technical strategy, and long-term scalability initiatives



  





**Relevant experience beyond the core requirements** 



* Experience with frameworks such as Flask, FastAPI, or Django
* Experience defining and implementing test strategies, including automated testing approaches
* Experience working in agile teams; experience in coordination or Scrum Master responsibilities is considered a strong advantage
* Experience with GitOps principles and tools such as Argo CD
* Experience deploying and maintaining cloud-based and distributed systems
* Experience with blue/green deployment strategies is considered a plus.



  





**MORE ABOUT TOPTRACER** 




  





**Workplace** 




  





 We value fully engaged associates that come to work because they enjoy their work and the colleagues they have. We strive to create a diverse and inclusive work environment where everybody can reach their full potential. We provide opportunities for all colleagues to develop internally and to meet each other. We have a strong commitment and dedication at Toptracer. That comes from the activities and moments we share together and the product we are developing.
 



  





 In addition to that, our technology is unique and world-leading which makes the journey extra exciting. We create a product that encourages people to be outside and get activated which enables a healthier lifestyle. As a colleague at Toptracer, you can either go to a range nearby your home to experience the product you have developed or just turn on the TV to see it in the biggest golf tournaments.
 



  





**Culture** 




 Our culture is driven by our mission to create moments that matter for everyone and our values for Caring, One Team, Fun, Excellence and Edgy Spirit. If you want to learn more about them visit: Core Values | Topgolf.
 



  





**Activities** 



* Morning Fikas
* After-work
* Pair/Mob programming
* Conference
* Dart
* Gym sessions
* Table-tennis
* Golf simulator
* Golf tournaments



  





**Benefits** 



* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to work on cutting-edge technologies and projects.
* Collaborative and innovative work environment.
* Professional development and growth opportunities.
* A hybrid work environment with the primary workplace at our cozy and welcoming office in Mörby Centrum, Danderyd.
* And of course, play golf!



  





 The position is permanent and full-time, located at our office in Danderyd. Hit the link at the bottom of the page to read more about the team. We hope to hear from you soon!
 



  





**Social media:** 




 https://vimeo.com/339546469
 



 https://www.toptracer.com/
 



 https://careers.toptracer.com
 



 https://www.instagram.com/toptracer/?hl=sv

title: Payments Consulting & Implementation Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 What's it all about?
   

  

 Visa Consulting and Analytics (VCA) is the consulting arm of Visa, and drives tangible, impactful and financial results for Visa’s network clients, including both financial services and merchants. Drawing on our expertise in strategy consulting, data analytics, brand management, marketing, operational and macroeconomics, VCA solves the most strategic problems for our clients.
   

  

 VCA Implementation Services (VIS) extends Visa’s consulting capabilities by turning strategic recommendations into practical, scalable solutions. We help clients implement change effectively, accelerate adoption, and realize value faster in an increasingly digital payments landscape.
   

  

 We are looking for a Payments Consulting & Implementation Manager to manage and support the successful execution of cards and payment development/implementation/migration projects within Visa clients in the Nordics. In this role, you will be responsible for managing the projects from as-is to target solution, utilizing strong and extensive experience from previous projects to execute and navigate in complex organisations and multifaceted program structures. Bringing experience and knowledge from major projects, preferably within the payments/cards area, the role will provide industry best practice in preparations and execution of project deliverables.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Plan and execute change projects/activities from current state to target solution.
* Manage allocated resources (Visa, client, third party) and provide high-level visibility and progress reporting for the program.
* Actively engage and manage key stakeholders.
* Drive assigned initiatives and tasks professionally, timely, and with high quality.
* Ensure collaboration and integration within change initiatives.
* Understand and support the realisation of clients' business objectives, needs, and plans.
* Identify opportunities for improvements in ways of working.
* Provide thought leadership and projects regarding the future of payment and retail banking as needed.
* Coordinate with Visa Hub teams to provide support, additional information, and best practices.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 What we’re after:
   

  

* Understanding of card/payments products and its eco-system
* A management consultancy background with strong ability to effectively market own services to clients and build trust.
* Previous experience working as a consultant in payment-related projects with ability to drive business & technical projects end to end
* Previous experience liaising between the business and the technical teams
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for engaging with stakeholders including at senior executive levels
* Ability to manage project dependencies and project associated risks
* Experience in transformation and business readiness
* Ability to manage and support project team members (Visa and client).
* Proven experience of delivery techniques, methodologies, and best practices (Waterfall and Agile)
* Fluent in English and either Swedish, Danish, or Norwegian, depending on the location, both verbally and in writing.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Medicinteknisk ingenjör till Strålbehandlingsfysik och Teknik Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset, Solna
description:
Är du medicinteknisk ingenjör med ambitionen att fortsätta utveckla dina erfarenheter och kunskaper tillsammans i ett team med teknisk spetskompetens inom strålbehandling? I vår verksamhet kan du realisera det. Du kan både vara med av utvecklingen inom avancerad strålbehandlingsteknik och samtidigt vara till nytta för våra patienter. Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  





****Du erbjuds****




 Vi erbjuder dig möjligheten att vara en del av en avancerad sjukvårds- och utvecklingsmiljö inom strålbehandling tillsammans med ett kompetent och välmeriterat team. Hos oss får du arbeta i en verksamhet där teknisk spetskompetens, patientsäkerhet och innovation står i fokus.
 




 Självklart får du också ta del av våra generella förmåner som Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset erbjuder dig.
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 På Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset bedrivs en omfattande verksamhet med användning av strålning inom ett 50-tal patient- och funktionsområden. Här ingår diagnostisk och interventionell röntgen, strålbehandling, diagnostisk och terapeutisk nuklearmedicin, labb-verksamhet med öppna strålkällor, cyklotronverksamhet samt magnetresonansteknik.
   

  





 Vid sektionen för Strålbehandlingsfysik och teknik arbetar idag drygt 45 sjukhusfysiker, 6 dosplanerare och 5 medicintekniska-ingenjörer. Sektionen har det samlade strålningsfysikaliska/tekniska ansvaret för strålbehandlingsverksamheten vid Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset.
   

  





 Verksamheten är lokaliserad i den nya sjukhusbyggnaden i Solna. Extern strålbehandling bedrivs med åtta stycken linjäracceleratorer samt en Gammaknivsutrustning. Brachyterapi är utrustad med tre stycken efterladdare och en kontaktröntgenterapiutrustning. Verksamheten medverkar också i hög grad i den nationella Skandion-protonverksamheten i Uppsala.
   

  





 Arbetet som ingenjör omfattar service, underhåll och kvalitetssäkring av samtliga behandlingsutrustningar och tillhörande medicinska IT-system.
   

  





 Du kommer bland annat att arbeta med:
 


* Förebyggande underhåll och kvalitetskontroller
* Akut felavhjälpning och teknisk felsökning
* Hantering av reservdelar och teknisk dokumentation
* Installation, administration och support av medicintekniska datorer och applikationer
* Processhantering av verksamhetens IT-system, inklusive databashantering och nätverksrelaterade frågor
* Deltagande i verksamhetsutveckling och tekniska förbättringsarbeten



 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid (100 %) som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse
   

  





****Vi söker dig som****



* Har ett stort intresse för kvalitetssäkrade arbetssätt och hög patientsäkerhet
* Arbetar metodiskt, strukturerat och ansvarsfullt
* Har mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och kan uttrycka dig tydligt i både tal och skrift
* Har god förmåga att samarbeta med olika yrkesgrupper och skapa förtroendefulla relationer
* Har gott omdöme och förmåga att prioritera och fatta välgrundade beslut även i komplexa situationer
* Är flexibel, initiativtagande och bidrar aktivt till verksamhetens utveckling
* Trivs med att arbeta i multidisciplinära team där samarbete är en förutsättning för framgång
* Förstår komplexa organisatoriska strukturer och har ett gott omdöme i samarbetet med olika interna och externa intressenter



 Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  





 Vi ser det som en självklarhet att du delar våra värderingar Ansvar – Medmänsklighet – Helhetssyn och vår vision: 
 *Patienten först – tillsammans skapar vi den bästa vården.*




****Kvalifikationer****




 Krav:
 


* Högskole- eller civilingenjörsexamen inom medicinteknik, datateknik, elektronik eller motsvarande utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift



 Meriterande:
 


* Erfarenhet av service och underhåll av medicintekniska acceleratorer
* Erfarenhet av service och underhåll av medicintekniska system
* Kunskaper inom IT-infrastruktur och nätverk
* Erfarenhet av Windows-miljöer och Active Directory
* Kunskap inom databaser och nätverksfelsökning



****Om rekryteringsprocessen****




 Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske fortlöpande under ansökningstiden.
   

  





 I samband med din ansökan behöver du bifoga CV. Istället för ett personligt brev ber vi dig besvara urvalsfrågor samt kort motivera varför du passar för rollen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan - Tillsammans är vi Karolinska!
   

  





 Inför tillsättning av befattning som innefattar vård av barn och ungdom, kontrolleras den som erbjuds tjänsten mot misstanke- och belastningsregistret. Här kan du läsa mer om rekryteringsprocessen och om vilka kontroller som utförs på Karolinska.
   

  





  

 Som anställd på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset kan du komma att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om vad det innebär här.
   

  





  

 Om du är eller tidigare har varit anställd i Region Stockholm kommer vi att ta interna referenser från din nuvarande eller tidigare chef om du blir aktuell för anställning.
   

  





  

 För tillsvidaretjänster kan provanställning komma att tillämpas.
   

  





**Om Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset**




  

 Vi på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset är stolta över att vi är ett av världens främsta universitetssjukhus. Förutom vårt särskilda ansvar för den högspecialiserade vården i Stockholmsregionen är huvuduppdraget att tillsammans med Karolinska Institutet utbilda framtidens vårdanställda och bedriva världsledande forskning samtidigt som vi fortsätter vårt arbete med att utveckla vården för patientens bästa. Vi arbetar inom en rad olika områden och professioner.
   

  





 Du kan läsa mer om vårt uppdrag inom vård, forskning och utbildning här.
   

  





  

 Vår vision - Vi ska bota och lindra imorgon det ingen kan bota och lindra idag.
   

  





  

 Läs gärna mer om oss på karolinska.se och följ oss på sociala medier!
   

  





**Funktion Medicinsk Diagnostik Karolinska**




  

 Funktion Medicinsk Diagnostik Karolinska är en sammanslagning av Karolinska Universitetslaboratoriet och Bild och Funktion med laboratorieverksamhet, radiologi, nuklearmedicin, medicinsk strålningsfysik, radiofarmaci och strålsäkerhet inom Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset.
   

  





 Här kan du läsa mer om Medicinsk Diagnostik Karolinska.
   

  





 Här kan du läsa mer om Karolinska Universitetslaboratoriet.
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Sales Manager HPE Networking
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Family Definition:**
 Leads the sales team to drive growth and profitability. Builds a high-performing team, manages sales execution and forecasting, and strengthens customer and partner relationships. Supports complex deals and drives pipeline growth aligned with HPE strategy.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Manages a sales team and is accountable for results (revenue, people, operations). Provides guidance, drives execution, and supports team development. Typically reports to Director level.
   

  

**Additional Guidance/criteria**
* Manages and controls activities within a single country (Sweden)
* Manages a team of ~8–15 people


**Responsibilities**
**Managing the Business:**
* Sales coverage – Build targeted business plans and allocate resources to drive sales and margins; collaborate across teams to prioritize and direct activities.
* Account planning – Support sales strategy and processes; align account plans with corporate strategy; manage geography plans to meet revenue targets; ensure accurate forecasting, progress tracking, and regular reviews.
* Pipeline management – Build, track, and manage a healthy pipeline (short and long term); monitor size, quality, and win/loss performance.
* Deal management – Review deals to ensure quality and smooth execution; track deal progress and governance.
* Business acumen – Apply business, financial, and legal understanding to improve performance and align operations with company direction.
* Strategic sales planning & implementation – Develop and execute sales strategies to grow market share and drive profitable growth.
* Competitive positioning – Use market insights to strengthen positioning and counter competitors in customer engagements.


**Leading & Managing Sales People**
* Coaching & performance management – Manage and develop team performance; support individuals through challenges and drive results across all performers.
* Leadership – Lead by example; motivate and support teams in winning and closing deals.
* People development – Drive skill development to increase team productivity and impact.
* Change management – Lead the team effectively through change and transformation.
* Attract and hire top talent to the team


**Selling As a Sales Manager**
* Strategic direction – Align team activities with company strategy and support solution positioning based on customer needs.
* C-level engagement – Build strong relationships with senior customer stakeholders and decision-makers.
* Consultative selling – Coach teams on identifying and advancing opportunities; support client engagements and ensure access to the right resources.
* Industry & client knowledge – Stay up to date on market trends and customer challenges; position solutions aligned to business needs.


**Your Profile**
**Education and Experience Required:**
* Proven sales leadership experience with strong results
* Project management skills
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 7+ years experience in IT sales
* Fluency in both English and Swedish are required


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Business Management: Proven ability to execute sales strategy and manage pipeline, forecasting, and overall performance
* Sales Development: Demonstrated experience in mobilizing resources, driving sales execution, growing key accounts, and hiring top talent
* Workforce Management & Development: Strong people management skills, including performance management, coaching, and team development
* Customer Engagement: Proven ability to build strong customer relationships and drive high levels of customer satisfaction
* Strategic Business Planning: Experience managing revenue and margins, with a focus on identifying and driving strategic growth opportunities
* Sales Team / Individual Coaching: Strong coaching and mentoring capabilities; ability to support deals, align team priorities, and drive results


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 #sweden
   

  

 #networking

 Sales

title: AI Growth Manager
description:
**Vill du vara med och bygga Tres nästa tillväxtområde?**
 Som AI Growth Manager får du stort mandat att utforska, testa och etablera hur AI, data och smart automatisering kan skapa verklig kommersiell effekt. Rollen handlar om att förstå hur kundresan förändras när interna och externa LLM:er, AI-agenter och agentiska köpupplevelser blir en allt större del av hur kunder söker, jämför, väljer och köper.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som kombinerar affärsdriv med nyfikenhet på ny teknik och som kan omsätta kundinsikter, data och idéer till konkreta resultat. Låter detta som du? Tveka inte att skicka iväg en ansökan redan idag!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som AI Growth Manager blir du en del av teamet AI & Lean, där vi utvecklar nya arbetssätt, stärker organisationens AI-förmåga och skapar mätbar effekt genom AI, processförbättringar och smartare kundresor.
   

  

 Du får en nyckelroll i att forma hur Tre använder AI för att öka försäljning, konvertering, retention och kundupplevelse. Det innebär att du arbetar med hela kedjan: från att identifiera möjligheter och formulera hypoteser till att genomföra tester, dra insikter och skala initiativ vidare i verksamheten.
   

  

 En viktig del av rollen blir att utforska hur Tre kan växa genom intern och extern agentisk handel. Internt kan det handla om hur LLM:er och AI-agenter används i exempelvis chatt, app, webb, CRM, marketing automation, kundservice och säljstöd. Externt handlar det om hur Tre ska förstå, påverka och optimera sin närvaro i nya LLM-drivna miljöer till exempel AI-sök, externa språkmodeller, rekommendationsmiljöer och agentiska assistenter där kunden kan få rådgivning, jämföra erbjudanden och genomföra köp direkt via en AI-agent.
   

  

 Rollen fungerar som en AI Growth Incubator, där du driver initiativ från idé och hypotes till test, lärande och skalning. Du utvecklar arbetssätt, KPI:er och playbooks som gör det möjligt att ta framgångsrika initiativ vidare in i den ordinarie verksamheten.
   

  

 Du arbetar tvärfunktionellt nära bland annat försäljning, CRM, e-handel, analys, IT, produkt och kundservice, och omsätter affärsbehov och kundinsikter till AI-drivna lösningar som skapar mätbar affärseffekt.
   

  

**Du kan se fram emot att**
* Bygga en ny roll och ett nytt strategiskt tillväxtområde inom Tre.
* Utforska hur intern och extern agentisk handel kan bli en framtida försäljnings-, konverterings- och retentionmotor.
* Utveckla Tres förmåga inom Agentic Engine Optimization, AI-sök och agentiska köpmiljöer.
* Skapa tillväxt genom interna LLM:er och AI-agenter i exempelvis chatt, app, webb, CRM, marketing automation, kundservice och säljstöd.
* Identifiera kundbehov, beteenden och friktioner i digitala kundresor och omvandla dem till AI-drivna tillväxtinitiativ.
* Översätta affärsbehov och kundinsikter till tydliga krav mot IT och tekniska team, så att AI- och datadrivna initiativ kan byggas, testas och skalas på ett effektivt sätt.
* Vara med och forma hur Tre använder interna och externa LLM:er för att skapa bättre kundupplevelse, ökad försäljning och högre effektivitet.
* Vara en del av en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser enligt Great Place To Work. Vi är även stolta samarbetspartner till Women in Tech och Tjejer Kodar.


 ,
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som är kommersiellt driven, analytisk och nyfiken på hur AI, LLM:er och agentisk handel förändrar kundresan, försäljningen och sättet kunder fattar beslut. Du trivs i nya och snabbföränderliga miljöer där du får utforska möjligheter, testa hypoteser och omsätta insikter till mätbar affärsnytta.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet från områden som growth, digital försäljning, CRM, e-handel, marketing automation, produktutveckling eller affärsutveckling. Oavsett tidigare titel är du van att använda data, kundinsikter och experiment för att driva tillväxt, förbättra kundupplevelsen och skapa affärsresultat.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har god förståelse för digitala kundflöden och hur teknik kan användas för att skapa bättre affärsresultat. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av AI, automatisering, LLM:er, CRM-plattformar, analysverktyg, experimentdriven utveckling, SEO/AEO, konverteringsoptimering eller kommersiell utveckling av digitala kundresor.
   

  

 Du behöver inte vara teknisk specialist, men du behöver kunna förstå tekniska möjligheter tillräckligt väl för att omsätta dem till affärsnära initiativ, kravställa mot tekniska team och driva utveckling från idé och test till implementering och skalning.
   

  

 I rollen har du inget personalansvar, men du behöver vara trygg i att driva initiativ, skapa framdrift och engagera människor över team- och funktionsgränser. Som person är du strukturerad, kommunikativ och handlingskraftig. Du kan förklara nya tekniska möjligheter på ett enkelt och affärsnära sätt, även för personer som inte själva arbetar nära AI eller teknik.
   

  

 Eftersom vi verkar i en internationell miljö behöver du kunna kommunicera obehindrat på både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift. Du har en relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
   

  

 Vi frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att nå ut till rekryterande chef Nic Staeger på: Nic.Staeger@tre.se

title: Channel Sales Executive Nordics - Cloud Products
description:
**Company Overview**
 At Motorola Solutions, we believe that everything starts with our people. We’re a global close-knit community, united by the relentless pursuit to help keep people safer everywhere. We build and connect technologies to help protect people, property and places. Our solutions foster the collaboration that’s critical for safer communities, safer schools, safer hospitals, safer businesses, and ultimately, safer nations. Connect with a career that matters, and help us build a safer future.
   

  

**Department Overview**
 Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) is a global leader in mission-critical communications and analytics.
   

  

 At Motorola Solutions, we create technologies our customers refer to as their lifeline. Our technology platforms in communications, software, video and services help our customers work safely and more efficiently. Our technology platforms in mission-critical communications, command center software and video security & analytics, bolstered by managed & support services, make cities safer and help communities and businesses thrive. At Motorola Solutions, we are ushering in a new era in public safety and security.
   

  

 Avigilon, a Motorola Solutions company, designs, develops, and manufactures video analytics, network video management software and hardware, surveillance cameras, and access control solutions. Avigilon's solutions have been installed at thousands of customer sites, including school campuses, transportation systems, healthcare centers, public venues, critical infrastructure, prisons, factories, casinos, airports, financial institutions, government facilities, and retailers.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Reporting to Avigilon’s Regional Sales Director, the Channel Sales Executive - Video & Access Control - acts as a primary contact for all video solutions selling initiatives with end-users in Nordic countries with a Focus on Avigilon Alta, Cloud based platform, proactively manages their relationships and deploys sales actions and strategies in order to grow business and meet territory revenue goals.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop new business with end customers that will be fulfilled via our partner channel
* Meet or exceed assigned revenue and project quotas focused on Avigilon products and services.
* Promote and market Avigilon’s products and services within the assigned territory and named accounts.
* Support Avigilon’s sales activities in the assigned territory and accounts by creating, nurturing, and responding to sales opportunities for Avigilon’s products and services.
* Create and manage a healthy sales funnel.
* Conduct sales calls, schedule local promotional work and track sales activities.
* Emphasis will be placed on new account development.
* Work with vertical marketing teams to identify end user engagement opportunities through associations, conferences, and tradeshows.
* Leads video and analytics solution development efforts that best address end-user needs, while coordinating the involvement of all necessary company and partner personnel.
* Prospecting on a daily basis using all tools available will be key to the success of this position.
* Attain “Trusted Advisor” status with customers and Channel Partners to enable increased System and Business Development.
* Sales Forecasting as required.
* Maintain CRM data for new and existing account development.


 Basic Requirements
   

  

* 3+ years of sales experience


**Qualifications**
* 4+ years of technical solutions sales experience
* Experience selling Cloud based Solutions is a Must Have.
* IT Industry experience with focus on SaaS solutions is required.
* Physical security solutions experience a plus
* Experience working with channel strategies and initiatives
* Strong technical acumen and ability to speak towards our products and solutions
* Ability to accurately forecast revenue on a weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual basis
* Proven record of achievement in delivering sales results and developing collaborative relationships
* Strong understanding of our go-to-market strategy and sales philosophy is required
* Excellent analytical, verbal and written communication skills in German and English
* Time management skills are required, and candidates must have the ability to manage multiple priorities in a complex, fast-paced environment
* Functional understanding of Microsoft and Google Apps, especially Excel/Sheets
* Exceptional presentation skills required
* Strong computer skills with the ability to learn and demonstrate new software at a high level
* Having an established client base in the assigned territory is a plus


 Location and Travel requirements:
   

  

* Seeking candidates based in regions Sweden, Stockholm or Norway, Oslo. Travel will be up to 50% of the weekly time. This travel will primarily be within the Nordics Territory.


 Travel Requirements
   

  

 Over 50%
   

  

 Relocation Provided
   

  

 None
   

  

 Position Type
   

  

 Experienced
   

  

 Referral Payment Plan
   

  

 Yes
   

  

**Company**
 Motorola Solutions Sweden AB
   

  

***EEO Statement***
 Motorola Solutions is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status or any other legally-protected characteristic.
   

  

 We are proud of our people-first and community-focused culture, empowering every Motorolan to be their most authentic self and to do their best work to deliver on the promise of a safer world. If you’d like to join our team but feel that you don’t quite meet all of the preferred skills, we’d still love to hear why you think you’d be a great addition to our team.

title: Operations Engineer - Citrix
description:
Vattenfall IT söker nu en Operations Engineer inom Virtual client & system software solutions (Citrix) som vill arbeta med utveckling och leverans av IT-tjänster med fokus på säker och stabil drift. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med modern teknik i nära samarbete med engagerade kollegor i en öppen, inkluderande och icke‑hierarkisk organisation där trivsel och respekt värderas högt. Vår arbetsmiljö präglas av samarbete, jämställdhet och en kultur där alla röster räknas.
   

  

 Som Operation Engineer kommer du att vara en del av ett team men vi ser även att du har förmågan att arbeta självständigt mot externa leverantörer såväl som kollegor runt om i Sverige och Europa. För dig som individ finns det stora möjligheter till personlig utveckling och påverkan i den dagliga leveransen.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**
* Drift och övervakning av centralt managerade kundmiljöer
* Säkerställa att befintliga miljöer utvecklas och ansvara för design och implementation av lösningar
* Delta i transformations- och förändringsprojekt
* Effektivisera och automatisera arbetssätt och system
* Patchhantering och uppgradering
* Felsökning i varierad storlek och komplexitet


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är driven, tar egna initiativ och är självgående. Du har ett genuint intresse av att lära dig och förstå ny teknik, samt visar god förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i nya tekniska område genom att vara framåtriktad och lösningsorienterad. Vi ser gärna också att du är förtroendeskapande, både inom den egna gruppen och mot övrig verksamhet. Du trivs i förändring och har en naturlig strävan mot ständiga förbättringar. Du har god samarbetsförmåga, och ödmjukt förhållningssätt till människor omkring dig. Du trivs att samarbeta med andra och har även god struktur i ditt egna arbete.
   

  

**Vi Ser Gärna Att Du**
* Har arbetat i stora miljöer både med drift och utveckling av IT-infrastruktur
* Har erfarenhet av Citrix CVAD, Windows server, Windows 11
* Har kunskap om VDI, AD, GPO, Nätverk
* Behärskar svenska och engelska obehindrat i både tal och skrift
* Förstår och anammar högt IT säkerhetstänk
* Innehar körkort B


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Kunskaper om IT-relaterade processer och ramverk såsom ITIL
* Erfarenhet inom Ivanti Suite, FSLogix, Powershell, VMWare, vSAN, Endpoint management
* Kunskap om Netscaler, Applayering, provisioning, WEM, 2FA, F5
* Linux erfarenhet
* Grundläggande script/programmerings erfarenhet och automation (t.ex. Ansible, Python, Powershell)
* Arbetat med Gitlab


 Ytterligare information
   

  

*Förutom att du får vara med och forma framtidens smarta energisamhälle erbjuder vi dig ett utvecklande och omväxlande arbete med många kontaktytor. För oss på Vattenfall är det viktigt att arbete och privatliv har en god balans, därför erbjuder vi flexibilitet i arbetet samt möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån vid behov. Vi har även en hel del andra personalförmåner som exempelvis arbetstidsförkortning, förmånliga tjänstepensionsavtal, föräldraledighetstillägg med mera. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.*
**Placeringsort**
 Ringhals, Forsmark, Solna, Oskarshamn.
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Anna-Karin Johansson, anna-karin1.johansson@vattenfall.com För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta rekryterare Julia Norberg, julia.norberg@vattenfall.com
   

  

 Fackliga representanter via Vattenfalls växel, 08 739 50 00. Akademikerna – Sofi Wadström, Ledarna – Christer Gustafsson, SEKO – Juha Siipilehto, Unionen –Patricia Ek. Du når dem via 08-739 50 00.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-07.** 
 Urval och intervjuer sker efter sista ansökningsdatum. Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via vår webbplats. Vi tar inte emot personligt brev i ansökan. Du söker snabbt och enkelt genom att svara på urvalsfrågor och bifoga ditt CV.
   

  

 På Vattenfall värdesätter vi att vara aktiva, positiva, öppna och säkerhetsmedvetna. Vi söker medarbetare som delar vår vision och kan bidra till att stärka vår företagskultur. Vi är övertygade om att mångfald bidrar till att bygga ett mer lönsamt och tilltalande företag och strävar efter att vara goda förebilder när det gäller mångfald. Vattenfall arbetar aktivt för att alla medarbetare ska ha samma möjligheter och rättigheter oavsett ålder, etnisk eller kulturell bakgrund, könstillhörighet, religion/tro, sexuell läggning eller funktionsvariation. Läs mer om hur vi arbetar med mångfald och inkludering här.
   

  

 Då säkerheten för Vattenfall och dess anställda är avgörande kommer vi innan varje anställning genomföra en ”pre-employment screening”. Dessa kontroller baseras på din roll som du kommer att fylla inom Vattenfall.
   

  

*Att arbeta inom Vattenfall innebär att arbeta med samhällsviktig infrastruktur. Därmed är många av våra tjänster säkerhetsklassade och du kan komma att bli krigsplacerad. Är denna tjänst säkerhetsklassad kommer säkerhetsprövning genomföras innan anställning, i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen. En eventuell krigsplacering sker med stöd i anställningsavtalet och lagen om totalförsvarsplikt.*
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Företagsbeskrivning
   

  

 Vattenfall är en av Europas största producenter och återförsäljare av el och värme. Våra huvudmarknader är Sverige, Tyskland, Nederländerna, Danmark och Storbritannien. Inom Vattenfallkoncernen finns cirka 21 000 anställda. Vi har elektrifierat industrier, levererat energi till bostäder och förvandlat tillvaron genom innovation i över hundra års tid.

title: Junior Business System Owner till Dahl
description:
*Vill du leda systemprojekt nära affären och påverka hela supply chain-flödet? Här får du en central roll i att utveckla och förbättra Dahls systemlandskap.* 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Den här tjänsten är en direktrekrytering vilket innebär att rekryteringsprocessen sker genom Bravura och du anställs direkt hos Dahl.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 Dahl är Sveriges ledande handelsbolag för flöden inom VS, mark & VA, kyla, industri och fastighet. Med över 100 års erfarenhet hjälper de sina kunder att få vardagen att fungera, från leverans till installation och drift.
 



  





 Från det automatiserade centrallagret i Bålsta distribuerar Dahl dagligen till omkring 4 000 orter i Sverige. Majoriteten av leveranserna sker idag fossilfritt med hjälp av en fordonsflotta som drivs av biogas, el eller HVO100. Verksamheten omfattar även ett åttiotal butiker runt om i landet.
 



 I rollen som Junior Business system owner tillhör du Supply Chain Development, ett team på tio personer bestående av processledare, processägare och testkoordinator. Teamet arbetar nära både IT och den operativa verksamheten.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 I den här rollen arbetar du i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT. Du ansvarar för att utveckla, förbättra och samordna systemlösningar kopplade till Dahls supply chain-flöden. Rollen är affärsnära och innebär att du driver projekt, analyserar behov och säkerställer att lösningarna fungerar i praktiken.
 



  





 Du samarbetar tätt med både verksamheten, IT-avdelningen och externa leverantörer. En viktig del av arbetet är att förstå verksamhetens krav och översätta dessa till konkreta systemkrav, samt att följa upp och etablera lösningar i test- och produktionsmiljöer.
